subject: Help Joni Ernst fight back

body:
A group of Never Trumpers led by a former lobbyist for Vladimir Putin launched a multi-million dollar attack on Republican Senators, including myself and my good friend Joni Ernst. While these baseless smears are easy to see through, we know this attack is the first of many to come. That’s why I need your help. My good friend and colleague in the Senate, Joni Ernst, is fighting back against this attack and many others by Dark Money Dems, but her resources are in need of extra support.Click here to unsubscribe http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/CottonSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=42973668&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTgwMTIzNjU1MQS2&spReportId=MTgwMTIzNjU1MQS2

I’m asking for your help today, and here’s why:

While these baseless smears are easy to see through, we know this attack is the first of many to come. That’s why I need your help.

My good friend and colleague in the Senate, Joni Ernst, is fighting back against this attack and many others by Dark Money Dems, but her resources are in need of extra support.

With the news of this multi-million dollar attack this month, Joni cannot not afford to fall short of her goals.

Will you chip in $10, $25, $50 or even $100 to help Joni fight back against these baseless attacks? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI5NzM2NjgS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMTIzNjU1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: Trump's visit to Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
We can't let Trump's visit derail our momentum:
| | |
---
Friend,

I'm running a people-powered campaign to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate, and I need your help: Donald Trump just came to Georgia to rally support for Republicans in the state, and we need to act now to stop him from derailing all the momentum we've built here.

**The stakes couldn't be higher:** What happens in Georgia could decide which party controls the Senate - and with new polls showing me in a statistical tie with my Republican opponent, Trump and McConnell have never been more vulnerable.

**But I'll be honest: We're getting outspent.** Our Republican opponent is spending $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat, and McConnell-linked dark-money groups are flooding the state with millions more. Trump's visit and massive GOP spending could ruin our chance to take back the Senate for Democrats unless we hit all our grassroots fundraising goals - and with just hours to go before a big deadline tonight, we're still falling dangerously short.
That's why this news is so amazing: **A group of fired-up donors just stepped up to match every single donation, dollar for dollar, to help us get back on track - but only until midnight. [Please, will you give $5 or more now to help us flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and restore moral leadership to our government? When you give right now, your contribution will go _twice_ as far.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5da/288179be/9bcbe13/348e7189/3937046676/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDQzLWZyLW5kLXYxIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk443-fr-nd-v1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
The fact that Trump came down to Georgia - and that McConnell is lining up the full force of the GOP establishment to keep this seat red - proves one thing, and one thing only: **Republicans are _terrified_ that their grip on power is in serious danger.**

And they should be: Georgia is _the_ battleground state this year. We're taking up Stacey Abrams' historic mantle, registering more than 700,000 new __ voters, and last month, turned out in _record_ numbers to vote in Georgia's primary election.
But despite our incredible momentum, my opponents are still outspending us - and if we fail to take advantage of the rare match opportunity before us, we could be handing Senate control to Mitch McConnell for another two years.
**Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can take back the Senate - but we **_have_**to win in Georgia. **So if you care about flipping Georgia blue, ending Mitch McConnell's Senate majority and restoring moral leadership to our government, I'm counting on you to **rush your immediate grassroots support before our critical match expires: **
[**Please, friend: Give $5 or more ($5 becomes $10) - before midnight tonight - to have every dollar DOUBLED so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats.**](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5da/288179be/9bcbe13/348e7189/3937046676/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDQzLWZyLW5kLXYxIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk443-fr-nd-v1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Thank you for coming through when it matters most. I appreciate your support.

Reverend Warnock
| | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5da/288179be/9bcbe13/348e7189/3937046676/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDQzLWZyLW5kLXYxIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk443-fr-nd-v1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5da/288179be/9bcbe13/348e718a/3937046676/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031

name: Biden HQ
subject: Please, Peter, we have to ask one more time before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We'll cut right to it: This is the last email you'll get from Biden HQ about our mid-month deadline. |
---
Peter,

We'll cut right to it: This is the last email you'll get from Biden HQ about our mid-month deadline.

[If you can give right now, your contribution will make a real difference and make sure we reach our critical goal of 150,000 online donations before midnight. Will you give $5 or whatever you can afford tonight?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.16_B4_endmmd_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.16_B4_endmmd_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | [DONATE](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.16_B4_endmmd_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.16_B4_endmmd_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
This is truly a grassroots campaign -- with 97% of our donations coming from grassroots supporters -- and, Peter, you are a key part of this movement to unite the country and defeat Donald Trump.

There is so much at stake in this election. We really are in a battle for the soul of the nation, and we can only win that battle together.

The honest truth is this: presidential campaigns are incredibly expensive. And while we're proud to say we've outraised Trump and the Republicans the last two months, they still have a three-year fundraising headstart and more cash-on-hand than we do right now.

If we're going to make Donald Trump a one-term president, we have to catch up fast, Peter. And to do that, it's critical that we reach this mid-month goal.

**Thousands of first-time donors have chipped in this month already, and we are so close to reaching 150,000 online donations before midnight.**

[No matter what amount you're able to give, any donation tonight could be the one that gets us over the line. So, Peter, we're humbly asking one last time: can you make your first donation today?](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.16_B4_endmmd_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.16_B4_endmmd_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b81a/1cd0ac28/8ec1d8f1/357c6eeb/3941238006/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b81a/1cd0ac28/8ec1d8f1/357c6eea/3941238006/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b81a/1cd0ac28/8ec1d8f1/357c6ee7/3941238006/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b81a/1cd0ac28/8ec1d8f1/357c6ee6/3941238006/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. name: Holcomb Crew
subject: COVID-19: Where Indiana stands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Starting July 23, gatherings of MORE than 250 Hoosiers, such as fairs, festivals, parades, graduations, concerts, conferences, etc., must work... | | |
---|---|---
Friends,

Governor Holcomb is working hard to get Indiana back on track. As he’s said all along,_**the data will drive the timing of this plan**_ – and this week, we learned more about where the data stands in Indiana.
|
---
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a156206e462544979ce92b2aea2b35e1&_e=AAVHzqXkTDvWpRz1vjUyr2MVhzpoGX5LxvDkLVo4soKcUd9DpIm8cbFzUsD1-pXmx4trfE48ValP7Ziu965Rnnr8Voj-XnUlffTCV-hjf83eteXTzb7nKyDyjmRNP6IKuKGMLJ0e_2lTUq17uJXsi_fkJUtU2H1E9gz4t_Don-VHHY5tkDralJ5fJSxWK05B4yR7j3KkzlpR24Wr2YPqrboa7jeiUcmQrA4f7EVYXxpL-RVPrmOdheZfjWYmCvYX-XOzza5YCDtx22yYv2GSg7GJYC-oOPDd6JBjD9O2VvjwlZs2keWIgd8NO-O9ApWoW2iJzYglJL4EBelzoIPlnhpaZ0fGwrBxWCReJIY2_yQe7yqcez4kEgipH_JPvhmHeO9Fp3HV8W5bJbJuV79V4BGtfezXsJ0XO_yaue1Sp3aOiESkWklESeHD4tK5L0Zb)
|
---
As you’ll see from the chart above, like many states across the county, _**Indiana is seeing an uptick in the percentage of Hoosiers who are testing positive each day for COVID-19.**_

These are the four guiding principles Governor Holcomb is watching closely –
* **Hospitalizations** – 15% of all positive cases are currently leading to hospitalization, which is down slightly from last week
* **Surge Capacity** – Our hospitals’ surge capacity remains strong with 35.5% of open ICU beds and 84% of ventilators available
* **Testing** – 182,000 Hoosiers have taken advantage of free community testing provided by OptumServe or the Indiana State Department of Health. As you’ll see in the chart, 7.1% of those tests are coming back positive – which is up
* **Contact Tracing** – Indiana’s contact tracing team is in high-gear making calls to people who have tested positive or their close contacts

_**With all of this data in mind, this week Governor Holcomb announced that Indiana will remain in Stage 4.5 for at least the next two weeks.**_ Elkhart County will remain in Stage 4.

Starting July 23, gatherings of MORE than 250 Hoosiers, such as fairs, festivals, parades, graduations, concerts, conferences, etc., must work with their local health department to develop a written plan to mitigate against COVID-19.

_**We’ll continue to keep you updated on the latest in Indiana’s COVID-19 data here.**_ In the meantime, let’s all continue to be safe. Wear a face covering when you go out, wash your hands frequently, and social distance when you can. By taking these steps together, we’ll get Indiana back on track!

-Your Holcomb Crew

P.S. Remember – testing capacity remains strong throughout Indiana. Have COVID-19 symptoms? Have you been around someone who tested positive? Go get tested today. The Indiana State Department of Health and OptumServe sites are free and don’t require an appointment. **[Find the site near you.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a156206e462544979ce92b2aea2b35e1&_e=AAVHzqXkTDvWpRz1vjUyrwC80GKkLVHZztmWAKScg4S6lcJwf1IYf_JAaRRRKjTJ2AZ-XYWOTVhMr5Y7S8pLVszQ9pmmfZUU9fP9BsYGZXspF3WRNQrGdp7B8Uk6ix1RWZ-riHsCFtwsn3eO7ClVJbI_gfhH-9Jo53w9-vRAnzSsfZ0HgwTjSGPYhOApw-cctFuMdOLgUYrdUM6t7jpXxiBhKu675RWLdiyPvdKE4un-86K6fcTqm8L1O6aQ_dtLouEOyaqybfK-hiKKajKt4uG4mxaCn_voc87W6Vnr201ySmrdHSWYks-FQiDh99E7Cx4-aTN_9rPsMSizVuBbue_F2krS06-8-EOV5wWykNT5Sc1yLwDbF3GPYqRKYY2ACTuqZkB8fZdamBKcoMVEeVxQkGjkIRSaz_9jxSiUMji9eLVDVSDDTn7jVU5lm8Efv7MXDZKqSufXMTM6Cy9uIQ%3D%3D)**
---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Am I not getting your endorsement?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
If you've already endorsed our campaign for re-election, thank you. Please consider reaffirming your commitment to our movement today.

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55739788:WKD__3-HN:m:1:2247059263:C1BDFAF8E3F8C060F0FB7741C0ADAD1D:r)
---

Peter,

Like you, my team and I are having to adapt to the present reality of things, which includes altering campaign related activities, fundraising events, and having our primary election date postponed.

With the absence of campaign rallies, door-knocking, and in-person voter outreach efforts, now more than ever it's important to activate our online support community.

**[That's why today I'm asking you- as one of the most valued members of the American conservative movement - to personally endorse my re-election campaign.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55739788:WKD__3-HN:m:1:2247059263:C1BDFAF8E3F8C060F0FB7741C0ADAD1D:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55739788:WKD__3-HN:m:1:2247059263:C1BDFAF8E3F8C060F0FB7741C0ADAD1D:r)
As a front-line Republican and steadfast ally of President Trump, Democrats have long targeted me for electoral defeat in November's election. They don't like debating with me with regard to important legislation in the House; and **they cannot stand how we're helping the American public come to the realization that Democratic leadership in Congress is more focused on partisanship than getting things done for the American people**.

So, if you agree with me that:

[**Chip in to his campaign here >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18290785/223617350/1282771135?refcode=07172020_em_su_tk_b1_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGM1MzNhNy0yN2M4LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HerYuGtg9S3N2f8pJSurDj-g3-ghNhMFGY_MD71wO1g=)_

Dear Friend, "The president has said unmistakably that he wants schools to open. And when he says open, he means open in full, kids been able to attend each and every day at their school. __The science should not stand in the way of this__..." - _White House Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany_ It was such a stunning statement I thought that there must be more context. And there was - McEnany emphasized a JAMA study that concluded the "risk of critical illness for COVID is far less for children than seasonal flu." And she pointed out that the US is an outlier among western nations, who are generally re-opening their schools. What she ignores is: * Other western nations have controlled the virus - we are setting records for case counts almost daily. * While children are at low risk for _critical_ illness, they do contract COVID-19. 5% of COVID cases here in Texas are in children 10-19 years of age. * The children interact with teachers and staff, and of course return home to their families, posing potential transmission risks to all. * Example: Israel re-opened their schools fully on May 17th. In the first two weeks of July, 393 kindergartens and schools have shut down again due to COVID-19 cases. We DO have to reopen our schools, but we have to do it safely based on the _totality_ of our experience and the science, not on the political needs of a candidate or party. Pete Sessions has had little to say about the pandemic. He has pledged blind loyalty blindly to this administration and seems to hope that if he just ignores it, it will go away. This is not magically going to go away. When I'm sworn in in January 2021, the human and economic impacts of the pandemic will still be driving the legislative agenda. Job one for me will be to protect both the lives and the livelihoods of Central Texans, not the political ambitions of a party or a president. _**[Demand Better. Click here or a button below to pitch in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18290786/223617351/-1907457920?refcode=07172020_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGM1MzNhNy0yN2M4LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HerYuGtg9S3N2f8pJSurDj-g3-ghNhMFGY_MD71wO1g=)**_ _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | **[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18290787/223617352/1282771135?refcode=07172020_abx1&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGM1MzNhNy0yN2M4LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HerYuGtg9S3N2f8pJSurDj-g3-ghNhMFGY_MD71wO1g=)** | **[$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18290788/223617353/1282771135?refcode=07172020_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGM1MzNhNy0yN2M4LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HerYuGtg9S3N2f8pJSurDj-g3-ghNhMFGY_MD71wO1g=)** | **[$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18290789/223617354/1282771135?refcode=07172020_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGM1MzNhNy0yN2M4LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HerYuGtg9S3N2f8pJSurDj-g3-ghNhMFGY_MD71wO1g=)**

subject: Ramping up to State Primary Day!

body:
We are less than 2 months out from the state primary, and we need to keep our momentum going to win BIG! Read more >>

He’s very excited about our momentum as we enter crunch time. We are getting close to 50 days out, and we can’t let up now! **To help us keep our grassroots support going as we work hard to get voters to the polls, Corky launched a 50 Days Fundraising Drive**. Can we count on you to rush an emergency contribution before Monday at 11:59 p.m.? [RUSH a donation NOW! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/737e9473a29dbd72/222cf55d06f9e482c3d6b838967d376c/33153) It is crucial that we show up strong and support Corky in the New Hampshire state primary. He is the only candidate that can take on Jeanne Shaheen in November and send her packing. That’s why President Trump endorsed Corky in this race — because he knows he has what it takes to not only beat Shaheen, but also stand up to the D.C. swamp rats in the Senate. He will always stand up and do what’s right for Granite Staters and ALL Americans. The Democrats aren’t going to give up this seat easily though. They have their sights set on flipping the Senate, and they know that if Corky wins in the general election, there is zero chance of that happening. The liberal machine is pouring in buckets of outside, special-interest money to try and prop up D.C. Jeanne Shaheen. Will you help us fight back by donating now? Democrat-run cities across the nation are on fire. Nancy Pelosi has blocked important legislation in the House and hurt Americans because of her petty partisan politics. Corky will always put the people of New Hampshire over political games. He’s not a career politician. He’s had his career, and doesn’t need this job. He wants this job, because he sees how liberalism is destroying America as we know it. name: Mary Mancini
subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: Early Voting Starts Today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Copy%20of%20Copy%20of%20header%20%283%29.png]
Dear Peter,
Early voting for the August 6th primary started this morning. There's no time to waste getting to the polls, so we're keeping this week's letter short and sweet.

If 2020 has shown us anything, it's that leadership matters. Leadership matters at the local level, in state government, and in Washington D.C. This election includes State and Federal primaries as well as county general elections.

With so much at stake, and with you so many of your friends and neighbors stepping up to register and vote [https://www.tennessean.com/story/news/politics/2020/07/04/tennessee-vote-mail-absentee-ballot-requests-soar-before-primary/5355011002/?emci=ea607c28-6fc0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=6362892] , you can't sit this one out. We've compiled a list of reminders and tips for voting during COVID-19.
*
MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE: Will you vote or on election day? In the morning, lunchtime, or at night? Will you take the kids?
WEAR A MASK
SOCIALLY DISTANCE WHILE WAITING IN LINE TO VOTE
BRING HAND SANITIZER IF YOU CAN
REMEMBER TO BRING A PHOTO ID
*
EARLY VOTING: Early voting locations and times vary from county to county so contact your local county election commission to find:
Locations, days and times, Sample ballots
On Election Day, August 6, you will have to vote at your assigned precinct, which you can search for here.

[https://tnsos.org/elections/election_commissions.php?emci=ea607c28-6fc0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=6362892]

ELECTION DAY IS AUGUST 6: You will have to vote at your assigned precinct, which you can search for here:
[https://tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup/?emci=ea607c28-6fc0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=6362892]
.

ABSENTEE VOTING: If you are a registered voter and do not wish to vote in-person due to the COVID-19 situation, you are eligible to request an absentee ballot by mail. You also have the option to vote in-person during early voting or on Election Day. More info on absentee ballots can be found
[https://sos.tn.gov/products/elections/absentee-voting?emci=ea607c28-6fc0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=6362892]

*
DEMOCRATIC CANDIDATES: Visit TNDP.org for a list of all Democrats on the ballot
[https://tndp.org/2020-democratic-candidates/?emci=ea607c28-6fc0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=6362892]

*
PROBLEMS? Call the TNDP voter protection team at 615-327-9779

This year we learned we have to vote like our lives depend on it, because, they do. Please reach out to the TNDP voter protectection Director, Kendra Lee, at kendra@tndp.org [kendra@tndp.org] with any other questions or problems you have about voting.
See you at the polls,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
COCKTAILS AND QUESTIONS
WITH STATE HOUSE CANDIDATE
ELIZABETH ROWLAND
https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/590201611682793/ [https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/590201611682793/]
This week, Elizabeth Rowland joined Chair Mary Mancini for Cocktails and Questions with Candidates. Elizabeth is running for Tennessee State House District 16. Elizabeth talks about why she decided to run and the priorities of her campaign, and then takes questions from viewers. Join the discussion! [https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/590201611682793/]
TWEETS OF THE WEEK
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-07-17%20at%207.33.47%20AM.png]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-07-17%20at%207.40.30%20AM.png]
WE NEED YOUR HELP
July and August are traditionally the hardest months to raise money in politics. With everything a stake in this election we have to not only meet but exceed expectations. And that’s why we’ve created the Amplify Democrats program. It’s a program designed to uplift and support the voices of Democrats and Democratic candidates in our communities, and promote local platforms and policies that will make positive change for Tennesseans.
Whether it’s expanding health coverage or defending women’s rights, Tennessee Democrats are out there fighting for a better future for ALL of us. Covering costs for voter outreach and candidate recruitment and training is critical to amplify these issues. We are trying to raise $25,000 in the next two months. Will you help us?
https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd

clean_body: [] Dear Peter, Early voting for the August 6th primary started this morning. There's no time to waste getting to the polls, so we're keeping this week's letter short and sweet. If 2020 has shown us anything, it's that leadership matters. Leadership matters at the local level, in state government, and in Washington D.C. This election includes State and Federal primaries as well as county general elections. With so much at stake, and with you so many of your friends and neighbors stepping up to register and vote [] , you can't sit this one out. We've compiled a list of reminders and tips for voting during COVID-19. MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE: Will you vote or on election day? In the morning, lunchtime, or at night? Will you take the kids? WEAR A MASK SOCIALLY DISTANCE WHILE WAITING IN LINE TO VOTE BRING HAND SANITIZER IF YOU CAN REMEMBER TO BRING A PHOTO ID EARLY VOTING: Early voting locations and times vary from county to county so contact your local county election commission to find: Locations, days and times, Sample ballots On Election Day, August 6, you will have to vote at your assigned precinct, which you can search for here. [] ELECTION DAY IS AUGUST 6: You will have to vote at your assigned precinct, which you can search for here: [] . ABSENTEE VOTING: If you are a registered voter and do not wish to vote in-person due to the COVID-19 situation, you are eligible to request an absentee ballot by mail. You also have the option to vote in-person during early voting or on Election Day. More info on absentee ballots can be found [] DEMOCRATIC CANDIDATES: Visit TNDP.org for a list of all Democrats on the ballot [] PROBLEMS? Call the TNDP voter protection team at 615-327-9779 This year we learned we have to vote like our lives depend on it, because, they do. Please reach out to the TNDP voter protectection Director, Kendra Lee, at kendra@tndp.org [kendra@tndp.org] with any other questions or problems you have about voting. See you at the polls, [] Mary Mancini Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party COCKTAILS AND QUESTIONS WITH STATE HOUSE CANDIDATE ELIZABETH ROWLAND [] This week, Elizabeth Rowland joined Chair Mary Mancini for Cocktails and Questions with Candidates. Elizabeth is running for Tennessee State House District 16. Elizabeth talks about why she decided to run and the priorities of her campaign, and then takes questions from viewers. Join the discussion! [] TWEETS OF THE WEEK [] [] WE NEED YOUR HELP July and August are traditionally the hardest months to raise money in politics. With everything a stake in this election we have to not only meet but exceed expectations. And that’s why we’ve created the Amplify Democrats program. It’s a program designed to uplift and support the voices of Democrats and Democratic candidates in our communities, and promote local platforms and policies that will make positive change for Tennesseans. Whether it’s expanding health coverage or defending women’s rights, Tennessee Democrats are out there fighting for a better future for ALL of us. Covering costs for voter outreach and candidate recruitment and training is critical to amplify these issues. We are trying to raise $25,000 in the next two months. Will you help us? [] PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE. Tennessee Democratic Party 319 Plus Park Blvd Nashville, TN 37217 United States

name: Ruth Richardson
subject: Racism is a public health crisis
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9DvDlSWUEXH03pXLNdhD9vKHYldr-kFNLUi6zNPU7a4=/jInZSTDQKlJYUbmywsf1DVVTefSx2qA7pL_61UY_65E=?refcode=071720)
| | Friend, In the last moments of his life, George Floyd called out for his mother. That is a call that I and mothers across the nation heard and responded to. Racism is a public health crisis just as COVID-19 is -- it is literally killing our communities. I think of my son, who loves to run, and the conversations we had because of the color of his skin. "You can't do the same thing as your white friends. It's going to be viewed in a totally different way," I told him. I want to live in a world where we tackle the systemic racism that puts the burden on Black parents to warn their children of the dangers of being Black. My son should be able to go for a run without fearing for his life. This week the Minnesota House is passing my resolution to declare racism as a public health crisis. This resolution also commits the House to dismantling racism in government, from health care to public safety to education. We can change legislation, but we can't change hearts and minds. The systems built in our country have been built with racism at their very core. Now, people talk about our systems being broken. Unfortunately, they are not broken -- they are working exactly as they were designed. Now is our time to tear down the enshrined systemic racism within our state and that's exactly what the DFLers of the Minnesota House intend to do. Thank you, **Rep. Ruth Richardson** 52B - Mendota Heights [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9DvDlSWUEXH03pXLNdhD9vKHYldr-kFNLUi6zNPU7a4=/jInZSTDQKlJYUbmywsf1DVVTefSx2qA7pL_61UY_65E=?refcode=071720)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Dana=20Barrett?=
subject: Two Things Have Become Clear...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dana Barrett for Congress**
body:
As we continue to analyze the data, two things have become clear... and we know what we need to do to |
---
| | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=30ee8caf33&e=e25784ff28)
---
| | Hey - Dana didn't get into this race because she thought it would be an easy victory or because she was ignoring the data. She got in because it was a fight that needed fighting. And now two things have become abundantly clear.

1 - Georgia's District 11 has changed dramatically and WE CAN WIN.
* Analysis of the data coming out of the primaries puts us within 2-3 points of the win.
* The district is moving to the left and is shifting demographically. ([Check out this page on our website to get the full picture.](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=e3a6959568&e=e25784ff28))

2 - We need to get the word out that Rep. Barry Loudermilk is bad for business, bad for parents, and bad for our health. He is not doing his job, but he's also staying under the radar. We need to get the word out that:
* He is an anti-vaxxer,
* that he voted against the Coronavirus relief bill,
* and that he is putting us at risk by ignoring the current state of our state.

Just this past Sunday, while speaking at Creekside Fellowship Church, Loudermilk said Georgia is “the envy” of the nation because the state is “almost back to normal.” He went on to say, “Everybody’s like ‘well, then you’re having this huge surge,’ and I’m like ‘not really.’” He added, “I mean, yeah, some people are getting sick, but it’s not like it was before. And part of it is because we’re not as afraid." [(read the full story here)](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=c18f7831c8&e=e25784ff28)

The changing district is our opportunity. Getting the word out about our incompetent incumbent is our challenge. And that's where we need your help!

[Can you chip in $101 today so we can move forward with our targeted digital outreach strategy?](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=9715ac4f57&e=e25784ff28)

body:
Georgia is the #1 battleground state
| | |
---
**BREAKING FROM MSNBC:**
**STACEY ABRAMS CONFIRMS GEORGIA IS #1 BATTLEGROUND STATE, SAYS WARNOCK (D) IS THE "MORAL WARRIOR" WE NEED TO FLIP THE SENATE**
**[Donate now to elect Raphael Warnock (D), win in battleground Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats!](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5de/288179be/9bb1599/348e7195/4273786259/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDI5LWZyLW5kLXYxIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk429-fr-nd-v1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
|
---
Friend, Stacey Abrams is 100% right: **Georgia isn't just a battleground - we are _the #1 _battleground state this year. **
When Stacey ran for governor in 2018, the strength of her grassroots movement was an undeniable wake-up call for Democrats across this country: Georgia is winnable and ready for change.
That's why Stacey is now ALL IN to help us build on her groundbreaking legacy by electing Reverend Warnock (D) as Georgia's first-ever Black senator. We can make history, flip Georgia blue and finish the work Stacey Abrams started - but only with your critical support.
**Right now, polling shows us running NECK-AND-NECK with our Republican opponent, and **_The Washington Post_ says our race is key to deciding Senate control - but the GOP is pulling out all the stops to hold us back and defeat our people-powered movement.
**We cannot win this race and end Mitch McConnell's majority without you. But with time running out until our next critical deadline, we're still 7.6% short of our goal - and we need you to donate as much as you can to keep us moving forward.**
**[Please, friend: Will you donate $5 or more RIGHT NOW to finish the work Stacey Abrams started, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5de/288179be/9bb1599/348e7195/4273786259/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDI5LWZyLW5kLXYxIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk429-fr-nd-v1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: in exactly one month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We need to make sure we're in as strong a position as possible heading into the Convention. |
---
Peter --

**In exactly one month, the Democratic National Convention will begin!**

Over four days, we'll nominate Joe Biden and his running mate as our official nominees for President and Vice President of the United States, showcase the strength and unity of our party, and jump headfirst into the most crucial, final months of this election.

Between now and then, though, we need to make sure we're in as strong a position as possible heading into the Convention in Milwaukee to set us up for success in November.

[With just a month until the Convention, we're still counting on our original team members to take our pre-convention survey. We haven't heard from you yet, Peter, can you take a moment to fill this out?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c4e/1151434235/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.17_B1_100daysconvention_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.17_B1_100daysconvention_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2") | [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c4e/1151434235/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.17_B1_100daysconvention_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.17_B1_100daysconvention_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2")
---
[ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c4e/1151434235/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.17_B1_100daysconvention_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.17_B1_100daysconvention_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2")
---
Because this year's Democratic National Convention will be the first of its kind, anchored in Milwaukee, but taking place across America, it's more important than ever that we show the strength of our Democratic ticket.

In just one month, we'll have the opportunity to make the case on a national stage for Democrats to win not just the White House but the Senate, the House of Representatives, and races up and down the ballot across the country.

Then, we need to be ready to harness that momentum in the final push to November.

So the input we get right now couldn't be more critical, and knowing we have a solid July grassroots base will be key to making decisions that can unite the Democratic Party.

[So, Peter, will you complete your focus group invite today, with just one month to go until the Democratic National Convention?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c4e/1151434235/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.17_B1_100daysconvention_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.17_B1_100daysconvention_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2")

Thanks for being a part of this,

JoeBiden.com
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c4d/1151434235/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c4c/1151434235/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c4b/1151434235/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c4a/1151434235/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c49/1151434235/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c48/1151434235/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c47/1151434235/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c46/1151434235/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c45/1151434235/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c44/1151434235/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c47/1151434235/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c43/1151434235/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c46/1151434235/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b819/1cd0ac28/8e05d5e1/357c6c42/1151434235/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Why I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
The people of Texas need a fighter.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890112/7f51f7bc/418927e4/4ef650d1/1215116801/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

With the runoff behind us, we're ready to move full steam ahead into the general election. I wanted to take this time to remind you what's at stake.

I'm a working mom, a combat veteran, and a survivor of domestic abuse and gun violence who has had her fair share of tough battles. I understand the challenges Texas families deal with every day, and I know what it's like to have urgent health care needs. I was shot down on a rescue mission in Afghanistan (I took shrapnel to my shoulder and leg), and I went through two difficult pregnancies.

**I know we need a senator who fights for access to affordable health care -- and Senator Cornyn has failed us.[Will you help me defeat him?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890112/7f51f7bc/418927e4/4ef650d0/1215116801/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200717.1nd__1737__&amount=10")**

I worry about the kind of world my kids are growing up in. Gun violence has become all too common across Texas -- yet Sen. Cornyn's campaign continues to take money from the NRA, and he's refused to enact meaningful reforms like passing universal background checks and closing the boyfriend loophole. I don't want my kids growing up in a world where I worry for their safety every day.

I'm running because Texas needs a senator who will fight on behalf of the PEOPLE of Texas, not just his special interest donors. **[Will you help me out and make sure that we've got someone in Washington who fights for every one of her constituents?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890112/7f51f7bc/418927e4/4ef650d0/1215116801/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200717.1nd__1737__&amount=10")**

The people of Texas need a fighter, Peter. Let's make it happen.

\-- MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890112/7f51f7bc/418927e4/4ef650d0/1215116801/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200717.1nd__1737__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890112/7f51f7bc/418927e4/4ef650d7/1215116801/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1737&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890112/7f51f7bc/418927e4/4ef650d6/1215116801/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890112/7f51f7bc/418927e4/4ef650d5/1215116801/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").
---

name: Team Gaetz
subject: Will Biden denounce “defund the police?”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tgbsv2LNausTH2__s8ajni_f13SrgHmbouhKDulqeWbqPguMHctfshZZZRRhu_5Jjk4jzjW8bOxsUek19qC7teYz2fidoYqWjJvnjy5lPi4n5LPzleYZU1T6PUBqIIL60dCidtXsgbTsw1JD18OWxIpCZybuI6WCkVvi8Cnozx2g5Xfb1q0MGw==&c=Ja7AuPz08qAQBRbuqInsJImCDNU6n26R5T25JdNgfHpeUk3Qi39_Vw==&ch=mYSSVQsdTACHxnwP0hkpwikQC3-PRXxQukFIECIV-oWbthDmaF5n7w==)
---
| Patriot,
Joe Biden, who is now the de-facto leader of the Democrat Party as their presidential nominee, has been silent on the left's movement to defund the police.
Will he stand up to "the Squad" and others in his party who want to defund and dismantle police departments across America? Or will he bow down to the radical wing of his party like he has on every other issue?
It's possible that we'll never know, as Biden has rarely left his basement in months and gets softball questions from the mainstream media when he does.
---
| | | [STAND AGAINST DEFUNDING THE POLICE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tgbsv2LNausTH2__s8ajni_f13SrgHmbouhKDulqeWbqPguMHctfshZZZRRhu_5Jjk4jzjW8bOxsUek19qC7teYz2fidoYqWjJvnjy5lPi4n5LPzleYZU1T6PUBqIIL60dCidtXsgbTsw1JD18OWxIpCZybuI6WCkVvi8Cnozx2g5Xfb1q0MGw==&c=Ja7AuPz08qAQBRbuqInsJImCDNU6n26R5T25JdNgfHpeUk3Qi39_Vw==&ch=mYSSVQsdTACHxnwP0hkpwikQC3-PRXxQukFIECIV-oWbthDmaF5n7w==)
---
| The truth is, Joe Biden is beholden to this radical wing of the Democrat Party. He is too fragile and confused to stand up for his own opinions, and he will be controlled by these leftists if he reaches the White House.
Our only hope for America is to reelect President Trump and continue to pass America-First policies that benefit the hardworking people of our country. As the President's number one defender, Matt needs all the help he can get to take on the radical left and the DC establishment who want President Trump out of office.
Will you lend a hand so that we can have hope for the future of our country?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW TO DEFEAT THE RADICAL LEFT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tgbsv2LNausTH2__s8ajni_f13SrgHmbouhKDulqeWbqPguMHctfshZZZRRhu_5Jjk4jzjW8bOxsUek19qC7teYz2fidoYqWjJvnjy5lPi4n5LPzleYZU1T6PUBqIIL60dCidtXsgbTsw1JD18OWxIpCZybuI6WCkVvi8Cnozx2g5Xfb1q0MGw==&c=Ja7AuPz08qAQBRbuqInsJImCDNU6n26R5T25JdNgfHpeUk3Qi39_Vw==&ch=mYSSVQsdTACHxnwP0hkpwikQC3-PRXxQukFIECIV-oWbthDmaF5n7w==)
---
| It's not too late to defend our American values and institutions, but we need to act quickly. The November election will be here before we know it, [and the Democrats already have a fundraising advantage over us.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tgbsv2LNausTH2__s8ajni_f13SrgHmbouhKDulqeWbqPguMHctfshZZZRRhu_5Jjk4jzjW8bOxsUek19qC7teYz2fidoYqWjJvnjy5lPi4n5LPzleYZU1T6PUBqIIL60dCidtXsgbTsw1JD18OWxIpCZybuI6WCkVvi8Cnozx2g5Xfb1q0MGw==&c=Ja7AuPz08qAQBRbuqInsJImCDNU6n26R5T25JdNgfHpeUk3Qi39_Vw==&ch=mYSSVQsdTACHxnwP0hkpwikQC3-PRXxQukFIECIV-oWbthDmaF5n7w==) We need to put the pedal to the metal if we are going to defeat them.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Patriot, Joe Biden, who is now the de-facto leader of the Democrat Party as their presidential nominee, has been silent on the left's movement to defund the police. Will he stand up to "the Squad" and others in his party who want to defund and dismantle police departments across America? Or will he bow down to the radical wing of his party like he has on every other issue? It's possible that we'll never know, as Biden has rarely left his basement in months and gets softball questions from the mainstream media when he does. | | | == | The truth is, Joe Biden is beholden to this radical wing of the Democrat Party. He is too fragile and confused to stand up for his own opinions, and he will be controlled by these leftists if he reaches the White House. Our only hope for America is to reelect President Trump and continue to pass America-First policies that benefit the hardworking people of our country. As the President's number one defender, Matt needs all the help he can get to take on the radical left and the DC establishment who want President Trump out of office. Will you lend a hand so that we can have hope for the future of our country? | | | == | It's not too late to defend our American values and institutions, but we need to act quickly. The November election will be here before we know it, == We need to put the pedal to the metal if we are going to defeat them. | | | == | Keep fighting, Team Gaetz | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2020 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=84A129A14A753)
---
| | |
---
| | This week on Red, White & True... Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton discusses mail-in ballots.
---
| |
Our interview with Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton is here! This week, General Paxton shares his experience fighting for ballot security in Texas - taking the case all the way to the Texas and U.S. Supreme Courts....and succeeding. Paxton ensures listeners that despite the efforts around the country to weaken our election laws, he will continue to fight for ballot security in Texas and prosecute any Texan who violates the law on requesting mail-in ballots.

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=84A129A14A816)

We need your help this election - please visit our [Call Your County](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=84A129A14A786) page and share with us what you learn about opportunities to serve at the polls in your county for the 2020 elections.

Tap or click below to listen. Stay tuned for video of the podcast which will be available tomorrow on our [YouTube](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=84A129A14A787) page.

name: SERIOUS [via Jon Ossoff HQ]
subject: Unconscionable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Gov. Kemp's mask ban is inexplicable. |
---
Hi friend,

**This week, Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp signed an executive order PROHIBITING local officials in Georgia from requiring masks in grocery stores, restaurants, bars, shops, and public buildings.**

_Amid skyrocketing COVID-19 hospitalizations in Georgia, and with over 3,000 deaths statewide, Georgia's Governor is ignoring public health experts and banning LOCAL OFFICIALS from putting common-sense mask requirements in place._

**Jon Ossoff thinks the Governor's actions are _inexplicable_ and _unconscionable_. Do you agree?**
| | [SIGN JON'S PETITION NOW](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e215a/5b2c1286/3dbdb53f/25f15491/3064670822/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/face-mask-ban")
---
Gov. Kemp is dancing to Donald Trump's tune, and we know the President has no interest in containing the coronavirus. He "hopes it will just disappear."

During his taxpayer-funded visit to Atlanta Wednesday, a maskless Trump practically ignored the pandemic and instead lavished praise on Kemp and Jon's opponent, GOP Sen. David Perdue.

**Earlier that day, Perdue told CNBC he thought "things in Georgia right now are going as well as they could be expected."**

For Perdue to say things are "going as well as they could be expected" is a slap in the face to the millions of Georgians who have been infected, lost their jobs, or face eviction, foreclosure, or bankruptcy as a result of the mismanagement of this public health and economic crisis.

_The remarks left the CNBC anchor "baffled."_

**Friend, we deserve better than the failed leadership of Trump, Kemp, and Perdue.**

Jon Ossoff will put health and safety first, and lead with facts and science instead of cowering to an incompetent demagogue president.

**[Please, sign Jon's petition calling for mask orders to stay in effect in Georgia during this pandemic.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e215a/5b2c1286/3dbdb53f/25f15491/3064670822/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/face-mask-ban")**

| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e215a/5b2c1286/3dbdb53f/25f15491/3064670822/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/face-mask-ban")
---
In this together,

Team Ossoff

name: Bill Olson
subject: Stop the radical Marxists now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyrgY1vO9F6OuRU&b=6Am_v9C6Z7l8Q.B7VNpkNA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to be YOUR champion in Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyrgY1vO9F6OuRU&b=6Am_v9C6Z7l8Q.B7VNpkNA

I am a Christian. As a Christian, we are taught to love, even your enemies.

That is why I don't understand the blind hatred the Democrats seem to have these days- against our country, against our history, against our very citizens!

Consider the actions of the Dems just in the last few weeks:

-Tearing down historical statues, even when it's illegal to do so. In Portland, mobs tore down statues of George Washington and Thomas Jefferson; in Richmond, Governor "Radical Ralph" Northam has torn down many statues along the city's famous Monument Ave. The DNC even came out swinging against historic Mt. Rushmore! It clearly doesn't matter if they are confederate statues or not; it's America they hate!

-Abolishing the police, depriving citizens of needed protection against violent crime. Look at what Joe Biden has now embraced:

It's clear Joe Biden's far left advisers are starting to change his stance on policing in America.

During an interview Wednesday with leftist publication This Now, Biden said the police are over militarized, have "become the enemy" and said funding should "absolutely" be reallocated elsewhere. In other words, he's advocating for the defunding of law enforcement as crime across the country continues to skyrocket.

-Depriving us of our Constitutionally-guaranteed rights, including our freedom of speech and freedom to worship.

The U.S. Constitution is also being tested in unprecedented ways, with religious leaders from Mississippi to Kentucky to San Diego County suing their governments, asserting that they are being treated differently from businesses that can remain open, such as supermarkets and liquor stores.

What is most disturbing is that the Supreme Court has backed California's restrictions on Freedom of Worship.

-Condoning violence by mobs.

House Democrats unanimously blocked a resolution condemning acts of violence and rioting—including the "deliberate targeting of law enforcement officers"—in the wake of George Floyd's death.

The resolution, which was introduced by Rep. Greg Steube (R., Fla.) late Thursday morning, condemned Floyd's killing at the hands of police, calling it "inconsistent with the values and conduct expected of law enforcement officers." The resolution also supported peaceful protesters, but it noted that protests have been "exploited by violent extremists" carrying out "acts of violence, looting, destruction of business and personal property, and additional loss of life."

Rep. Jim Jordan (R., Ohio) spoke in favor of the resolution, arguing that while Floyd's death was "wrong as wrong could be," there is a "big difference between peaceful protest and rioting." Jordan also spoke against defunding the police, calling it "one of the craziest public policy proposals I have ever seen."

Image

It is now clear that the Democrats, including my opponent Darren Soto, have been swept away by extremism, with the most fringe Stalinist parts of their base now driving the party's agenda. These ain't Kennedy's Democrats- they have more in common with Chairman Mao of the Chinese Communists!

Image

I fought for our country in Iraq and Afghanistan. My sons and I have served our country for decades- and when you take the oath to defend the Constitution, it has no expiration date!

I will defend our country and our Constitution against the Democrats' anti-American extremism. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyrgY1vO9F6OuRU&b=6Am_v9C6Z7l8Q.B7VNpkNA
?

Our district now knows that there is a better way forward- one which does not include overthrowing the Constitution and the entire American system- as Ilhan Omar now advocates:

Rep. Ilhan Omar says America is a giant “system of oppression” needing an immediate “dismantling” far beyond current calls for criminal justice reform.

“We can’t stop at criminal justice reform or policing reform,” she said during an outdoor press conference. “We are not merely fighting to tear down the systems of oppression in the criminal justice system. We are fighting to tear down systems of oppression that exist in housing, in education, in health care, in employment, [and] in the air we breathe.”

It's hard to believe, but this kind of Communist Revolution is now what the Dems, led by AOC and Ilhan Omar, advocate. That's why it's important to stand up for America- right now!

| | We're glad to have you as a member of Team Kennedy! We are closing in on our September 1st primary, and we need your feedback. Prior to this pandemic, Joe was constantly on the road - visiting 90 towns and cities in his first 90 days on the campaign trail. Or holding 14 town halls across the state in January alone. But just like all of our lives have changed, so did our campaign. Joe now checks in daily on Facebook Live and is always looking to hear from you. Joe is dedicated to fighting for what matters most to you. So as a member of our team, we wanted Joe to get your feedback on top priorities as we head into the 2020 election: **2020 Priority Survey: 1-click survey**

name: Kennedy Campaign HQ
subject: we can't go back to normal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390752/55b66746/219eb2d7/80ece14/2917104831/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Team, These past four months have been the most difficult stretch this generation has seen. But through these challenging times, one thing has become clear to us: **We can 't go back to normal.** Over 100,000 people have died and 45 million have lost their jobs. Generations of injustice has erupted in our streets. Our "normal" let that happen. And if we return to the status quo, with the same people in charge, nothing will change. That is why Joe is running for Senate. He wants to be a leader that pushes our country forward to a new normal. We need a country where healthcare is a right, not a privilege -- and we can withstand the next pandemic. A country where essential workers are treated as such. A country where every American can provide for their families and achieve opportunity that has been far too long out of reach. A country where Black and Brown Americans are treated with decency and respect. And a country where violent racist actions are met with swift justice. **[Are you still on board to help us fight for a better future?](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390752/55b66746/219eb2d7/80ece15/2917104831/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/s/are-you-still-with-joe")** | **[YES IM IN->](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390752/55b66746/219eb2d7/80ece15/2917104831/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/s/are-you-still-with-joe")**

clean_body: | "" | | Team, These past four months have been the most difficult stretch this generation has seen. But through these challenging times, one thing has become clear to us: We can 't go back to normal. Over 100,000 people have died and 45 million have lost their jobs. Generations of injustice has erupted in our streets. Our "normal" let that happen. And if we return to the status quo, with the same people in charge, nothing will change. That is why Joe is running for Senate. He wants to be a leader that pushes our country forward to a new normal. We need a country where healthcare is a right, not a privilege -- and we can withstand the next pandemic. A country where essential workers are treated as such. A country where every American can provide for their families and achieve opportunity that has been far too long out of reach. A country where Black and Brown Americans are treated with decency and respect. And a country where violent racist actions are met with swift justice. "" | "" Our movement is strong because of people like you, folks. "" -- Team Kennedy | | "" "" ""

subject: Here’s how you can make a real impact, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
I have a major announcement to make, and I wanted you to be among the first to know: We just added Margaret Good to our Red to Blue program -- our highly competitive list of challenger campaigns that will flip seats from red to blue in November.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18301017/223783624/-940294256?refcode=071720-es-ihc-r2b-bustos&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2RhZmJkNC02MWM4LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_038zWltPB298piQUPQbgqt0M2qwmN5KZfAcld4AdI=&emci=0ea0764f-9bc7-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=3cdafbd4-61c8-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644) Friends,

I have a major announcement to make, and I wanted you to be among the first to know: **We just added Margaret Good to our Red to Blue program -- our highly competitive list of challenger campaigns that will flip seats from red to blue in November.**

I’ve been keeping close tabs on Margaret’s campaign, and I’ve been incredibly impressed with what I’ve seen. Raised by a nurse and a pastor, Margaret Good was taught that we are called to work as hard as we can to build a better world. That calling first compelled her to run for state office because she was tired of a government that cared more about lobbyist checks than Floridians. Now she’s running against the 4th wealthiest Congressman in Washington to do the same. Congressman Vern Buchanan has toed his party’s line, even at the expense of his constituents, and Margaret Good is poised to flip this seat, rising above petty politics as she brings Florida’s 16th Congressional District the independent, accountable voice it deserves.

This is a big moment, friends. **[I’m calling on you to join me in my support of Margaret Good by making a grassroots contribution right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18301018/223783625/1073285021?emci=0ea0764f-9bc7-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=3cdafbd4-61c8-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&contactdata=MWdoxH7uspcJz4YLQdw3%2BZoWtTHTOZkOggpDTi7%2BOraXJfo9plbnIpWqjqxMCyB9a3affTefA7XiQUgtyBUN5Zxl%2BzeDdVVGjMxQnAEteeuZt6rcQqjEcCWqjYzXotqPRe%2Fs4cxD4B%2Fzm1tOQKRBIA%3D%3D&amount=10&refcode=071720-es-ihc-r2b-bustos&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2RhZmJkNC02MWM4LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_038zWltPB298piQUPQbgqt0M2qwmN5KZfAcld4AdI=)**

Now that Margaret Good is running a Red to Blue race, she is at the center of our efforts to protect and expand our House Majority. **This means that the Republican establishment is sure to do (_and spend!_) whatever it takes to defeat Margaret and protect their dangerous status quo and their special interest buddies.**

The path to victory in Florida's 16th District runs through grassroots supporters like you, and Margaret needs your support in order to win big on Election Day.

**[I’m asking again: Will you pitch in $10 right now to help flip this seat from red to blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18301019/223783626/1073285021?emci=0ea0764f-9bc7-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=3cdafbd4-61c8-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&contactdata=MWdoxH7uspcJz4YLQdw3%2BZoWtTHTOZkOggpDTi7%2BOraXJfo9plbnIpWqjqxMCyB9a3affTefA7XiQUgtyBUN5Zxl%2BzeDdVVGjMxQnAEteeuZt6rcQqjEcCWqjYzXotqPRe%2Fs4cxD4B%2Fzm1tOQKRBIA%3D%3D&amount=10&refcode=071720-es-ihc-r2b-bustos&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2RhZmJkNC02MWM4LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_038zWltPB298piQUPQbgqt0M2qwmN5KZfAcld4AdI=)**

As I’ve been known to say -- the best defense is a good offense. Margaret Good is an integral part of our offensive strategy, and I’m grateful for all you do to support her.

Thank you for everything you do,

Cheri Bustos
Chairwoman, DCCC

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. name: Sandy Smith
subject: Big endorsements are rolling in now!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hGP0kSMX23Nxmng&b=5.oz7flVOV5MIsxFnhru5g)
---
Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I'm a fighter, and I will fight for America and against the radical Democrats. I'm pleased to announce that many other warriors have joined the fight alongside me! [Will join join the fight with us?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hGP0kSMX23Nxmng&b=5.oz7flVOV5MIsxFnhru5g)
I am proud to announce the endorsement of a fellow North Carolina conservative woman, Virginia Foxx:
_“Being one of the few Republican women in Congress, I know first-hand how important it is to have strong conservative voices in Washington. Sandy Smith will be a great advocate for our conservative values and will be a strong fighter for North Carolina’s families. I fully support Sandy for United States Congress in North Carolina’s 1st Congressional district.**Sandy cares about the people of her district, she does what is right and won't back down from a fight. We need conservatives with a backbone like Sandy Smith.** ”_
[Do you agree with Congresswoman Foxx, that we need conservatives with a backbone?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hGP0kSMX23Nxmng&b=5.oz7flVOV5MIsxFnhru5g) The radical Socialists we are fighting have no conscience and no limits. To defeat them we will need to stand strong with our faith and our ideals!
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hGP0kSMX23Nxmng&b=7qaTuyDPj7atvdIt7jHpXQ)
---

**_But that's not all. Those who share our faith and our values, fighters against the Socialists, Family Research Council Action PAC has endorsed me as well!_**

_Dear Ms. Smith:_

_On behalf of FRC Action PAC, the political action committee connected with Family Research Council Action, it is my pleasure to announce our endorsement of your candidacy for the U.S. House of Representatives in North Carolina’s 1st Congressional District._

_Since its inception, FRC Action has supported candidates who take a strong stand for faith, family, and freedom. In this critical hour, Americans are looking for bold leaders who are willing to defend these values. From talking with you, evaluating your record, and speaking with those who know you, we believe you will be such a leader. You understand the fundamental importance of protecting the right to life, the central role strong families must play if our country is to thrive, and that religious liberty is the bedrock of a truly prosperous nation._

_From a young age, you have represented the value of hard work. Your entrepreneurial and adventurous spirit has enabled you to start several successful businesses. You also have a desire to serve others as evidenced by your community volunteer activities. And, with a child serving in the military, we know you have a heart to protect our military and to serve our nation._
_We believe your values and life experiences uniquely equip you to serve as this district’s next congressional representative._

_**FRC Action PAC is confident that you will be a dedicated advocate for limited government, for individual liberties, and for strong family values.** You are the leader that North Carolina needs, and we are pleased to offer our endorsement of your candidacy for Congress. Together we will create a culture in which human life is valued, families flourish, and religious liberty thrives._

_Sincerely,_
_Lt. Gen. (US Army-Ret.) William G. Boykin
Executive Vice President
Family Research Council Action PAC_

I know that freedom depends on values- and that in defense of our freedoms, our values will be the biggest weapon against the Socialists. Their vision is a hellscape; riots, murder by mob, no freedom, theft and destruction.

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hGP0kSMX23Nxmng&b=5.oz7flVOV5MIsxFnhru5g)
---

Our vision is a prosperous, free people who are left to live their lives in peace.

**Our vision protects the most vulnerable among us, the unborn. **

_That's why I'm honored to have the endorsement of National Right to Life._ They have been fighting for the unborn for decades- and I hope to be as staunch ally of theirs in Congress!
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hGP0kSMX23Nxmng&b=7qaTuyDPj7atvdIt7jHpXQ)
---
[If you share OUR vision for America, I need your help to change Congress and evict Pelosi!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hGP0kSMX23Nxmng&b=5.oz7flVOV5MIsxFnhru5g)

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi and her Socialist Squad! I have different values, American values, and together we will restore our Republic!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hGP0kSMX23Nxmng&b=5.oz7flVOV5MIsxFnhru5g), with your best and immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500.... or maybe even the Federal Maximum $2800 per person?

Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants is expensive, but it would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. _**Please rush back your supporting contribution today**_. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hGP0kSMX23Nxmng&b=5.oz7flVOV5MIsxFnhru5g). I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hGP0kSMX23Nxmng&b=5.oz7flVOV5MIsxFnhru5g)
---

Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hGP0kSMX23Nxmng&b=5.oz7flVOV5MIsxFnhru5g)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hGP0kSMX23Nxmng&b=5.oz7flVOV5MIsxFnhru5g) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsDIwMrBys) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsDIwMrBys)
