name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update July 10-July 17
body:
https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=85A130A14A761 WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK Friend, I hope you all are keeping cool as this summer heat amps up! For me, this hot Texas weather is a reminder that election season is upon us. The primaries are winding down, and we are about to be fully engaged in preparing for the general election of a presidential year. Buckle up! At True the Vote HQ, we are keeping busy, working on some exciting things that I hope to share with you in the coming weeks, specifically with regard to our efforts to be as engaged as possible in protecting our election security at the polls in November. I had the pleasure this week of talking with Newsmax's Chris Salcedo about the unique times we find ourselves in and what it means for our election process this fall. I hope you'll take a minute to watch the whole interview HERE >> Don't forget to find your county's election contact on our Call your County page and help us gather the information that will help voters like yourself learn how they can help with the election process in their own communities. Your work is so appreciated, we could not do this without you! Onward, Catherine CATCH OUR LATEST PODCAST EPISODES OF RED, WHITE, & TRUE THIS WEEK | EPISODE 10: | Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton. WATCH NOW > PREVIOUS EPISODES: Episode 9 | Debbie D'Souza WATCH NOW > Episode 8 | Citizen Watchdog Colleen Vera WATCH NOW > Episode 7 | Dinesh D'Souza WATCH NOW > Episode 6 | Breitbart Director Brandon Darby WATCH NOW > Episode 5 | Nevada Watchdog Megan Barth WATCH NOW > To see all previous episodes please visit here . NEWS TO KNOW 1. Biden super PAC launches $24 million vote-by-mail effort in battleground states The largest Democratic super PAC is investing $24 million in a new campaign to encourage Black and Latino voters in key battleground states to vote by mail in November. Priorities USA Chairman Guy Cecil said the advertising campaign aims to drive people to the appropriate websites so that people can request and fill out their absentee ballot forms. The super PAC, which is spending heavily to elect presumptive Democratic presidential nominee Joe Biden, will invest the $24 million in six core battleground states: Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Michigan, Florida, North Carolina, and Arizona. https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=85A130A14A782 2. Election Day could turn into "Election Week" with rise in mail ballots More officials are conceding that Americans likely won't know the result of the election on Election Day. The latest is former Homeland Security Secretary Tom Ridge who this week said: "We need to be talking about "Election Week," not Election Day. We've seen an unprecedented request for absentee ballots and it may take a little longer." Ridge is the co-chair of the new bipartisan group, VoteSafe. This is why True the Vote highly encourages people to vote in person, on Election Day, it is by far the most secure way to vote and ensure your vote is counted rather than lost in the mail! https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=85A130A14A784 3. Runoff elections show Texas not quite ready for November's main event Even in Texas where Attorney General Ken Paxton has stood firm against expanding absentee voting, there were problems with the vote by mail process in this week's primary. According to the Texas Tribune, "some Texans who sought to vote by mail - and submitted their applications on time - indicated they never received their ballots. Some opted instead to vote in person. Others went uncounted. It's unknown how many were affected. Other voters sent in their mail-in ballots only to have them returned unopened. Some of those reached county elections offices after a second attempt, while others still appeared lost on election night. It's also unknown how many were affected." https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=85A130A14A783 https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=85A130A14A815 Donate by Mail PO Box 3109 #19128 Houston, TX 77253-3109 https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=85A130A14A773 https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=85A130A14A774 https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=85A130A14A775 mailto:info@truethevote.org id:2020-07-09-16:35:03:537t
Copyright © 2020 True the Vote, All rights reserved.
True The Vote, PO Box 3109 #19128, Houston, TX 77253-3109, United States

You can update your preferences or unsubscribe from this list.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: YOU lose in this Republican Sell Out
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=republicans_about_to_sell_out&n=1)
---
Peter -- We are in the fifth straight month of Walz' unprecedented, illegal use of emergency powers that are infringing on our civil liberties and harming Minnesota businesses. But to the Republicans leading the Senate Majority and the House Minority, it's just another day of backroom deals and pork barrel projects. **The Pioneer Press[reports](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=QRGyUJkPeIkIYXtpLUF1kzAxq8rt7kioJagsYg5CtnK-Jf66IWCV8fgBaBxdOWLxmRbOJXhNt_odPMPqzbutGF0-7xjzS4oGHNN-2ysUJGJOEiZPEZPiVXQEmt5LQ5rs0Caf7DfANfNjY56gac4sMg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=republicans_about_to_sell_out&n=2) that a deal is close to being reached on bonding debt with lobbyist legislator Kurt Daudt (R-Spectacle Lake) and presumably Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka. "Walz said he and Daudt have been negotiating a compromise deal behind closed doors in recent days. 'I think we’re very close on this, [stated Walz], adding he was 'optimistic' and 'hopeful' they would get it done" wrote Bill Salisbury. ** How can a deal be close when Rep Kurt Daudt is on record numerous times in the past month stating that the House Republicans would not deliver the six Republican votes necessary to pass a bonding debt bill until Democrats vote to end Walz' Emergency Powers? The vote failed for the fourth time in the House on Tuesday with only four Democrats breaking ranks. Daudt is most likely willing to compromise on what he meant by "removing Walz' powers" using a **Fake End Powers bill** introduced by one of his caucus members this week, Rep Barb Haley. [HF 81](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=HefBAOuut_7GNMMJOHLvU3FAqwF7BAxkH1Kx9oRvnc8hAP6KUAokbVKr3_mqur8NIxIVTMM2t2ELFnEFLqouciydFDMUmfzkGyGSPbp-mMw&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=republicans_about_to_sell_out&n=3) changes parts of Chapter 12.31 that gives the Governor emergency powers during "acts of nature". According to the bill, the legislature would have two new options after 30 days of a Governor's emergency:
* if the governor extends the emergency peacetime declaration beyond 30 days, the legislature may consider each executive order under the emergency declaration individually and decide to rescind or affirm each individual executive order; or

* terminate any subsequent order or rule promulgated by the governor directing a specific response to the peacetime emergency.

The problem here is this **Fake End Powers bill** would need to be signed by the Governor, meaning further concessions on bonding or perhaps a mask mandate passed by the legislature. Why else would Walz be willing to cede his new powers? Make no mistake about it. If Daudt and Gazelka pass the **Fake End Powers bill** , they'll parade themselves around Minnesota as heroes. Meanwhile, Walz' illegal powers will still be in full effect. To make matters worse... The media reports that the bonding debt bill's price tag has risen from $1.3 Billion to $1.8 Billion. Does that mean we are putting the tab for Jacob Frey's Minneapolis disaster on the state credit card?!
### How do We The People benefit under this compromise?
### Democrats get to keep emergency powers and get more government spending
### Republicans get pork projects for their districts
### WE get the BILL!
Republicans need to hold the line and not be willing to give up one dime of our tax money (or future tax money). I think these legislators have forgotten that the state is broke with a $2.4 Billion budget deficit. Why are we negotiating away our freedoms for debt? If these bills pass, the Republicans have no more negotiating tools to end Walz' Emergency Powers. **Did you know that[Kurt Daudt works for a Washington DC lobbying firm](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=mI7Ws0NkibYEXUVfFZeJkIHoh3t7eB0Foc9Aov3gUYnHkVIodc_lgFhd_ZlavZY-tEkTBgvVCsKRZu0WJDxc2Xy1inHt96cndu_Dxao7RxsFy6AopmuWVCGURAHDEIP9&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=republicans_about_to_sell_out&n=4) called Stateside Associates? No wonder he likes making backroom deals with Democrats. ** Tell Gazelka and Daudt: _No Fake End Powers bill and backroom deal with Democrats. STOP compromising with our tax money. It's time the Democrats End Walz' Emergency Powers. There's nothing worth trading for this loss of our liberties._
### Rep Kurt Daudt - 651-296-5364 / kd@stateside.com
### Sen Paul Gazelka - 218-821-9287
### / sen.paul.gazelka@senate.mn
**In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=republicans_about_to_sell_out&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=republicans_about_to_sell_out&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=republicans_about_to_sell_out&n=7), software for leaders.

I know this will be a hard-fought race for Auditor General and I look forward to engaging in discussions around best practices and data driven solutions. = Dr. Nina P.S. Would you consider chipping in a recurring = to make sure we can get my message out and grow our base? = Learn more by visiting our website: = Follow us on Social Media: = = Copyright (C) Nina for PA. All rights reserved. name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: Did you see Beto's email from yesterday?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
I'm forwarding you Beto's email from yesterday, because I wanted to make
sure you had a chance to see it.

Our work to register and contact voters in Texas has been going really
well and is growing exponentially. We've set a new goal to reach every
single Democrat in the state for whom we can find a phone number, across
all 254 counties.

We need your help — starting right now! — to start this outreach and make
sure we can win a Democratic majority in the State House and stop Trump
forever in November.

With less than four months to go until Election Day on November 3rd, we
need a lot more volunteer power than we currently have. That's why we're
counting on you to help kick things off on a high note. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42664?source=ema20200717-97893&t=1001&akid=97893%2E444211%2EmP0mMc ]Can we count on
you to join us for a phone bank with Beto next Monday?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42664?source=ema20200717-97893&t=1002&akid=97893%2E444211%2EmP0mMc ]Get more info or RSVP »

We must reach out to Texas voters as often as we can before November to
remind them of their critical role this election year. The couple of hours
you give to make these calls now will make all the difference in November.

Hope to see you on the phone bank on Monday!

Thanks,

Kate Roberts
Powered by People

----------Forwarded message----------
From: Beto O'Rourke <info@betoorourke.com>
Date: Thurs, Jul 16, 2020
Subject: Expanding to all 254 counties of Texas

I'd like to share some news with you.

As you may know from previous emails I've sent you, our work to register
and turn out voters in Texas has gone really well, exceeding our
expectations.

Over the last two months, thousands of Powered by People volunteers have
stepped up to help us reach the Texas voters who will decide the most
important elections of our lifetime. Our volunteers have made over 1.2
million calls and, just since July 1st, have sent over 4 million
individual texts to voters across Texas. We're reaching out to all corners
of the state, encouraging folks to register to vote, and talking to
current registered voters in rural, suburban, and urban Texas.

Just this past Monday we had so many volunteers on our voter contact phone
bank that we made over 316,000 phone calls in one night.

In fact, this work has gone so well that we will now be able to
significantly expand our organizing and outreach ahead of the November
election. With the growing number of volunteers who've signed up to call
and text for us and the fundraising success we've had so far, we believe
we will have the capacity and budget to call and text every single
Democrat in Texas for whom we can find a phone number.

That's right — Powered by People will not only be working in competitive
State House districts, we will be expanding our organizing to every single
one of the 254 counties of Texas, calling and texting every single
Democrat to make sure that we help lead the largest voter turnout program
in the history of the state.

In addition, we will also continue to pursue a voter registration effort
that combines sending voter registration forms by mail with follow up
phone calls to likely Democrats who are currently unregistered. We've
helped register nearly 50,000 likely Democrats so far, and we're just
getting started.

This means that our Democratic candidates will be armed with a list of
confirmed voters, with confirmed phone numbers, in every single State
House district in the state. They will also be the beneficiaries of tens
of thousands of net-new voters to the rolls.

In the midst of this pandemic, unable to knock on doors, hold rallies and
town halls, and totally dependent on phone-to-phone field work, Democratic
candidates in Texas won't have to waste time calling bad numbers or Trump
supporters, because our volunteers will have made the millions of calls
necessary to cull the list of extraneous numbers and return a verified,
usable list of Texas Democrats that we can turn out during early voting
and on election day.

That will go a long way in helping our candidates win important State
House races and a new Democratic majority ahead of redistricting in Texas.
And perhaps most importantly, when the Biden campaign makes a decision to
invest big in Texas this fall (making the most of the clear opportunity to
win Texas' 38 electoral college votes), we will ensure that they can plug
into a state-wide voter contact database to efficiently and effectively
pursue turnout. This will dramatically improve our chances of winning
Texas for the Democratic nominee for President for the first time since
1976.

clean_body: I'm forwarding you Beto's email from yesterday, because I wanted to make sure you had a chance to see it. Our work to register and contact voters in Texas has been going really well and is growing exponentially. We've set a new goal to reach every single Democrat in the state for whom we can find a phone number, across all 254 counties. We need your help — starting right now! — to start this outreach and make sure we can win a Democratic majority in the State House and stop Trump forever in November. With less than four months to go until Election Day on November 3rd, we need a lot more volunteer power than we currently have. That's why we're counting on you to help kick things off on a high note. [ ]Can we count on you to join us for a phone bank with Beto next Monday? [ ]Get more info or RSVP » We must reach out to Texas voters as often as we can before November to remind them of their critical role this election year. The couple of hours you give to make these calls now will make all the difference in November. Hope to see you on the phone bank on Monday! Thanks, Kate Roberts Powered by People ----------Forwarded message---------- From: Beto O'Rourke <info@betoorourke.com> Date: Thurs, Jul 16, 2020 Subject: Expanding to all 254 counties of Texas I'd like to share some news with you. As you may know from previous emails I've sent you, our work to register and turn out voters in Texas has gone really well, exceeding our expectations. Over the last two months, thousands of Powered by People volunteers have stepped up to help us reach the Texas voters who will decide the most important elections of our lifetime. Our volunteers have made over 1.2 million calls and, just since July 1st, have sent over 4 million individual texts to voters across Texas. We're reaching out to all corners of the state, encouraging folks to register to vote, and talking to current registered voters in rural, suburban, and urban Texas. Just this past Monday we had so many volunteers on our voter contact phone bank that we made over 316,000 phone calls in one night. In fact, this work has gone so well that we will now be able to significantly expand our organizing and outreach ahead of the November election. With the growing number of volunteers who've signed up to call and text for us and the fundraising success we've had so far, we believe we will have the capacity and budget to call and text every single Democrat in Texas for whom we can find a phone number. That's right — Powered by People will not only be working in competitive State House districts, we will be expanding our organizing to every single one of the 254 counties of Texas, calling and texting every single Democrat to make sure that we help lead the largest voter turnout program in the history of the state. In addition, we will also continue to pursue a voter registration effort that combines sending voter registration forms by mail with follow up phone calls to likely Democrats who are currently unregistered. We've helped register nearly 50,000 likely Democrats so far, and we're just getting started. This means that our Democratic candidates will be armed with a list of confirmed voters, with confirmed phone numbers, in every single State House district in the state. They will also be the beneficiaries of tens of thousands of net-new voters to the rolls. In the midst of this pandemic, unable to knock on doors, hold rallies and town halls, and totally dependent on phone-to-phone field work, Democratic candidates in Texas won't have to waste time calling bad numbers or Trump supporters, because our volunteers will have made the millions of calls necessary to cull the list of extraneous numbers and return a verified, usable list of Texas Democrats that we can turn out during early voting and on election day. That will go a long way in helping our candidates win important State House races and a new Democratic majority ahead of redistricting in Texas. And perhaps most importantly, when the Biden campaign makes a decision to invest big in Texas this fall (making the most of the clear opportunity to win Texas' 38 electoral college votes), we will ensure that they can plug into a state-wide voter contact database to efficiently and effectively pursue turnout. This will dramatically improve our chances of winning Texas for the Democratic nominee for President for the first time since 1976. [ ]But we can't do this important work without your help — and with November just months away, we need your support now more than ever. Can you make a contribution to Powered by People today? Your support and your faith in our ability to help organize Texas have made this possible. I hope you will continue to contribute, continue to volunteer, and continue to keep the faith by keeping it going. Yours in getting this done, Beto Contribute to Beto's campaign:

subject: FIRE Fauci? Seriously?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
It's almost unbelievable, Derek
|
---

| | **_"As coronavirus surges, Trump and White House attack Fauci" -- PBS_** It's almost unbelievable, Derek. In the middle of a pandemic, top Trump allies and White House officials are attacking Dr. Anthony Fauci for putting science and the safety of the American people ahead of loyalty to Donald Trump.

In the face of these attacks on Dr. Fauci, Mark Warner is speaking out: | **"America needs Dr. Fauci. These attacks are unfair; we should be listening to health experts and following the science."

-- Mark Warner **
---
This is serious, Derek. With White House officials working to get Dr. Fauci fired, we want to know where you stand.

**Do you agree with Mark that America needs Dr. Fauci leading the coronavirus response?** | **[YES](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbd9/53d9897e/5479efda/1c885318/2448906207/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/content/warner-fauci/")** | **[NO](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbd9/53d9897e/5479efda/1c885318/2448906207/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/content/warner-fauci/")**

name: Cory Booker
subject: The first Black senator from Mississippi since Reconstruction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Espy for U
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18303250/223838303/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjkzYzNkZi03NmM4LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WkodCU4oo4fdOhi9zJa98-_0dSfhMjqwtK2LgFtaww4=&emci=a193c3df-76c8-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=a293c3df-76c8-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
Hi, I’m Cory Booker, U.S. Senator from New Jersey. I want to take a moment to talk about why I support Mike Espy in his race to become Mississippi’s next senator, and why I think you should too. Mike is a trailblazer and lifelong public servant who made history when he became the first Black U.S. congressman from Mississippi since the Reconstruction era, as well as the first and only Black U.S. secretary of agriculture in our nation’s history.**Now, he’s working to make history again by becoming Mississippi’s first Black U.S. senator since Reconstruction.** It can be shocking to realize that in the year 2020, _only 10_ African-Americans have served in the Senate in our country’s history – I myself was New Jersey’s very first Black senator when I was elected in 2013. And Mississippi, which has the highest percentage Black population of any state, has gone more than 100 years without Black leadership in the halls of the U.S. Senate. In this very special and important moment right now, across our country people — especially young people of color — are demanding change. Just look at the nationwide calls for criminal justice reform, and the amazing victory Mississippians saw last month when they finally removed the hateful and divisive confederate battle emblem from their state flag. **Mississippi, like our country as a whole, is changing.** And we need new leaders in the U.S. Senate who are ready and willing to change along with it for the better. I know Mike will be a fighter in the U.S. Senate for affordable health care, public education, economic opportunity, and justice for each and every one of us if he wins this November. clean_body: | Hi, I’m Cory Booker, U.S. Senator from New Jersey. I want to take a moment to talk about why I support Mike Espy in his race to become Mississippi’s next senator, and why I think you should too. Mike is a trailblazer and lifelong public servant who made history when he became the first Black U.S. congressman from Mississippi since the Reconstruction era, as well as the first and only Black U.S. secretary of agriculture in our nation’s history.Now, he’s working to make history again by becoming Mississippi’s first Black U.S. senator since Reconstruction. It can be shocking to realize that in the year 2020, only 10 African-Americans have served in the Senate in our country’s history – I myself was New Jersey’s very first Black senator when I was elected in 2013. And Mississippi, which has the highest percentage Black population of any state, has gone more than 100 years without Black leadership in the halls of the U.S. Senate. In this very special and important moment right now, across our country people — especially young people of color — are demanding change. Just look at the nationwide calls for criminal justice reform, and the amazing victory Mississippians saw last month when they finally removed the hateful and divisive confederate battle emblem from their state flag. Mississippi, like our country as a whole, is changing. And we need new leaders in the U.S. Senate who are ready and willing to change along with it for the better. I know Mike will be a fighter in the U.S. Senate for affordable health care, public education, economic opportunity, and justice for each and every one of us if he wins this November. And by refusing any Super PAC money, he’s counting on grassroots contributions from folks like you to do it. Help make history and flip the U.S. Senate this November: Chip in $10 or whatever you can to support Mike Espy’s people-powered campaign today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = – Cory Booker Paid for by Mike Espy for U.S. Senate Mike Espy for U.S. Senate 4450 Old Canton Rd, Suite 205 Jackson, MS 39211 United States

name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: our new mailer, interviews, Shaheen on taxes, and more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d13d2a1291182acf/76328baca3ade044c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Volunteer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d13d2a1291182acf/aa2524d681cdadbbc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Campaign Mailer Effort Targets 100,000 New Hampshire Households**
Our campaign launched its first direct mail piece this week, targeting 100,000 Republican and undeclared voters.

The brochure, headlined by “RESTORING AMERICAN LIBERTY & PROSPERITY,” includes Corky’s bio and his positions on the economy, border security, protecting First and Second Amendment rights, and fiscal responsibility, among other issues. It also features President Donald Trump’s endorsement.

The mailer urges voters to request absentee ballots via the Secretary of State’s office for those who are concerned about COVID-19 and in-person voting in the September primary and November general election.
|
---
**In the News**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d13d2a1291182acf/4f409ba4fdaaff24c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
New Hampshire Public Radio’s The Exchange kicked off a weekly meet-the-candidates series July 10 with an interview with Corky, hosted by Peter Biello.

[**Click here**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d13d2a1291182acf/36d7a92595f3069ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) to hear Corky’s take on recent social unrest, healthcare and more.
Corky also visited last week with Jack Heath, on NH Today, to chat about President Trump’s endorsement, the COVID-19 pandemic and much more. **[Tune in!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d13d2a1291182acf/4cc9489d58bf7c71c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d13d2a1291182acf/659b419de60eb1bbc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**Why Won’t Senator Shaheen Take a Stand on Broad-Based Taxes?**
Last week, Corky called on U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen to publicly take a stand on the question of an income or sales tax in New Hampshire. The decades-old debate about broad-based taxes is heating up with Governor Chris Sununu’s recent veto of House Bill 712 passed by the Democrat-controlled New Hampshire House and Senate -- a bill that the Governor considers an income tax.
“Democrats and Republicans are once again talking about ‘the Pledge’ and whether an income or sales tax is an economic necessity or political ploy,” said Corky. “As our most senior elected Democrat official, Senator Shaheen is in effect the head of the state’s Democrat Party, and as such, she owes it to her party and all Granite Staters to make clear whether or not she favors a state income tax.

“But as is her pattern, Senator Shaheen hangs to the rear on critical issues, and when the dust settles, she claims she was for the winning side all along, whichever side that might be. That’s what she calls being a ‘moderate.’ That’s what I call being politically expedient.”

Every New Hampshire governor, Democrat or Republican, has taken “The Pledge” opposing a sales and income tax, with one exception: in seeking her third term as governor, Jeanne Shaheen refused to do so. While she did win re-election, her support of a statewide sales tax was defeated.

“With our economy here in New Hampshire still reeling from the effects of pandemic closures and restrictions, you might expect our elected officials to come down on the side of taxpayers, and reject any and all attempts to burden us with income and sales taxes, whether you call them that or not,” said Corky. “The last thing our residents and business owners need right now is another economic hit.”
|
---
**Corky Continues to Meet with Granite Staters**

The campaign is picking up momentum and support, as Corky takes his message to voters across New Hampshire. He has met with GOP groups in Windham/Derry, appeared at the Salem Chamber of Commerce's Economic Development Breakfast, and continues to talk with Granite Staters about their concerns at every opportunity, in person or via Zoom or Facebook Live events. In the weeks leading up to the September primary, you can be sure Corky will continue to reach out and share his message of individual liberty and economic freedom.
|
---
**Shaheen’s First TV Ad Brings Strong Response**
Corky last week shared his response to U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen’s first campaign ad, a television spot focused on New Hampshire opioid crisis.
"My dad battled with an addiction to opioids, so I know firsthand the pain and challenges it brings to people and their families," said Corky. "No one will be a bigger champion for this cause than me in Washington."

"However, it’s no surprise that D.C. Jeanne Shaheen’s first ad of the cycle tries to put distance between herself and her party. The fact is, though, no matter how hard she tries, she can’t run from the swamp she has immersed herself in. The Senator is the head of the Democratic Party in New Hampshire. A party that nationally has been overrun by the likes of Bernie Sanders, AOC, and Ilhan Omar. A party that today wants to make our streets less safe, that wants to tear down our political system and replace our economy with socialism."

Corky concluded: "She cares more about pleasing ‘The Squad’ than she does about getting New Hampshire families back to work. No slick ad contrived by her political machine will be able to mask who she is and who pulls her strings."
|
---
**The Corky Store is Now Open!**
The **[Corky for Senate store](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d13d2a1291182acf/aebed717b0d72251c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** is NOW OPEN - have you checked it out yet? Show everyone you support Corky by getting your official campaign shirt today, and be sure to check back regularly, since we’ll be adding to our selection in the weeks to come.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d13d2a1291182acf/12b9bd3d138826ecc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|

subject: How we flip the house
body:
Take back the House, restore principled, conservative leadership, and put Congress back to work. That starts with turning districts like SC-01 red. | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/3763ccdd7af9/how-we-flip-the-house?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b807f54d21&e=f1831b4ca2)

---
| Hey — it’s Steve Scalise.

I’m emailing you today because I’m tired of the Nancy who’s currently in charge on Capitol Hill. It’s time for a new Nancy to take Congress by storm in 2020 — **and that’s Nancy Mace.**
---
| [Rush a donation and support Nancy Mace](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b6d8273736&e=f1831b4ca2 "Rush a donation and support Nancy Mace")
---
| **Friend, the Democrats’ reign in the House of Representatives has been an absolute, no-holds-barred disaster.**

Nancy Pelosi has ground legislation that Americans desperately need to a halt, put her own career ahead of the people she is supposed to serve, and done everything in her power to advance the left’s radical agenda.

_Enough is enough._

We need to take back the House, restore principled, conservative leadership, and put Congress back to work. That starts with turning districts like SC-01 red on November 3rd.
---
| [Rush a donation and support Nancy Mace](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=681fd96d79&e=f1831b4ca2 "Rush a donation and support Nancy Mace")
---
| **Friend, Nancy’s opponent has enabled Nancy Pelosi’s radical agenda every step of the way — I’ve seen it firsthand.**

When he ran for his seat in 2018, he promised to be an independent voice for the Lowcountry. But he’s been anything but an independent voice since he’s arrived on Capitol Hill (he even gave up his voting card to Nancy Pelosi!).

I’m counting on you to help Nancy restore conservative leadership to SC-01. Let me tell you — she’s the real deal and I cannot wait to work with her on Capitol Hill.

But we need to get Nancy the resources she needs to compete against her progressive, Pelosi-supporting, Democratic opponent.

**We don’t have much time and Nancy needs to raise $1.5 million in the last quarter before the election if she’s going to send our opponent packing and put the Lowcountry first.**

Will you step up and help her get the resources she needs to win in November?
---
| [Rush a donation and support Nancy Mace](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=43bc0381c4&e=f1831b4ca2 "Rush a donation and support Nancy Mace")
---
| I know you’ll come through for her.

Thanks,
---

Republican Whip

clean_body: Take back the House, restore principled, conservative leadership, and put Congress back to work. That starts with turning districts like SC-01 red. | | | | | | Hey — it’s Steve Scalise. I’m emailing you today because I’m tired of the Nancy who’s currently in charge on Capitol Hill. It’s time for a new Nancy to take Congress by storm in 2020 — and that’s Nancy Mace. | "Rush a donation and support Nancy Mace" | Friend, the Democrats’ reign in the House of Representatives has been an absolute, no-holds-barred disaster. Nancy Pelosi has ground legislation that Americans desperately need to a halt, put her own career ahead of the people she is supposed to serve, and done everything in her power to advance the left’s radical agenda. Enough is enough. We need to take back the House, restore principled, conservative leadership, and put Congress back to work. That starts with turning districts like SC-01 red on November 3rd. | "Rush a donation and support Nancy Mace" | Friend, Nancy’s opponent has enabled Nancy Pelosi’s radical agenda every step of the way — I’ve seen it firsthand. When he ran for his seat in 2018, he promised to be an independent voice for the Lowcountry. But he’s been anything but an independent voice since he’s arrived on Capitol Hill (he even gave up his voting card to Nancy Pelosi!). I’m counting on you to help Nancy restore conservative leadership to SC-01. Let me tell you — she’s the real deal and I cannot wait to work with her on Capitol Hill. But we need to get Nancy the resources she needs to compete against her progressive, Pelosi-supporting, Democratic opponent. We don’t have much time and Nancy needs to raise $1.5 million in the last quarter before the election if she’s going to send our opponent packing and put the Lowcountry first. Will you step up and help her get the resources she needs to win in November? | "Rush a donation and support Nancy Mace" | I know you’ll come through for her. Thanks, | | Steve Scalise Republican Whip | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 ZOHO, All rights reserved. You're receiving this email because you signed up for updates about Zoho. Our mailing address is: 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . | | | | | | | | | | | | |

---|---|---
Friend,

We told you last month — we restarted our grassroots fundraising campaign, and we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas.

**That’s why we’re inviting you to join the One Indiana Club.**
[**Join the One Indiana Club**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d17fe43b2f134312b950f7e4b4ba6cd2&_e=CJbk7hDszyN9s2lLV4MzV6QbWA9eisnJqTY7xhdkmbzE7LP4AW56TGH_sgWMA7mg-KeoJ8EdOZ8zfuVFuV85cuqu6joi8qO5Xs3g6zfHWm15iYNw_whLtGuSGpuibVc6Q8PXXIeF_zmdBHsTdQdvyjQoy6mtrE893C6JYOuCoKwdsq6tcGvAdeoOzvC7hwWslrjHWdc-u3URTnEN_KEBrHj11B_vh_1CiBVT0afcZAr5PqCaA7t6ohJmKXFPi0JXkgCUlTfT-4jeL0igTsdQ0hpFHrFdvptjuvzsxFNQI5ARs1W0lJZ3nNTugK9l4YY2_YizpeFxdJ6VNxlqMwAdTh8o51nmCj7VSLnqneSU6l1mfV3KR0FSvgrho549OGVRap1erUtI59o3hIhsWVEqSYpp-1Jm5JFK6VIpDJDJmcSnI-wTyk9M5O2A8Qn8-7hQikoLbluw8XD53ukT9pfdk39oV9gDhVYPd-Gt1Bu4_4Y%3D)
The One Indiana Club is a select group of grassroots donors who we’re going to rely on every step of the way from today until Election Day. Grassroots donors like you help us pay for ads, yard signs, t-shirts, travel — you name it.

_We could not run this campaign without you and that’s a fact. _

Getting 100 Hoosiers to join our new club before July 18 would help us pick up where we left off and make sure that Eric can continue to build One Indiana for another four years.

Friend, will you be one of the 100 grassroots donors who join our One Indiana Club?
[**Join the One Indiana Club**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d17fe43b2f134312b950f7e4b4ba6cd2&_e=CJbk7hDszyN9s2lLV4MzV6QbWA9eisnJqTY7xhdkmbzE7LP4AW56TGH_sgWMA7mg-KeoJ8EdOZ8zfuVFuV85cuqu6joi8qO5Xs3g6zfHWm15iYNw_whLtGuSGpuibVc6Q8PXXIeF_zmdBHsTdQdvyjQoy6mtrE893C6JYOuCoKwdsq6tcGvAdeoOzvC7hwWslrjHWdc-u3URTnEN_KEBrHj11B_vh_1CiBVT0afcZAr5PqCaA7t6ohJmKXFPi0JXkgCUlTfT-4jeL0igTsdQ0sZUE9aWb-l3m4Es7UAMPHMxXikj6Pfgt_FdL5FRx00LLTNgNpLOqYdzS3sTE8iUGe3bHmGpkmpqZJVMMmkBKYlnvImPEerOZ2Ldd9QvP2qbKnmKc1wrbKHnL6z1Mn-j5Wqj2SGiCVnK1Ju65eMjnTMzz7zjNdv4X2cCDFpfkeZmD7TXn7ktHRSiyGuiK5QiWgJg9dYLe9E-zGx1rNhXqlU%3D)
Thank you for your support,

Your Holcomb Crew

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Your 2020 Republican ticket
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Your 2020 Indiana Republican ticket is now official, and I have to say, there’s a lot to be excited about going into November. These candidates are | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/welcome-to-the-general-election-469538?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Your 2020 Republican Ticket_** A week ago today, we counted the votes, and delegates to our 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention selected **Todd Rokita** to be our Republican nominee for attorney general. And then on Monday we made the voice of our delegates official, as Todd signed the paperwork to put him on your ballot.

We now have your 2020 Indiana Republican statewide ticket, and I have to say, there’s a lot to be excited about going into November. These candidates are all proven leaders who have the vision and drive to continue leading Indiana through these turbulent times.

Nationally, our ticket will be led by **President Donald Trump** and our own **Vice President Mike Pence**. Together, they’ve taken on many of our nation’s biggest issues – trade imbalances, national security, growing our economy, etc. And even through this pandemic, **President Trump** is continuing to deliver, with the new USMCA trade agreement becoming official earlier this month.

**Governor Holcomb** leads our ticket here at home with a 79% approval rating. Through his leadership, Indiana has seen a coordinated, data-driven response to this pandemic. Over the last three and a half years, Governor Holcomb has helped Indiana attract more than 100,000 new job commitments, fully-funded a 20+ year roads and bridges program and led our state to over $1.6 billion in new education funding.

When it comes to our lieutenant governor, we’ve got the best one in the nation. **Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** is the perfect partner to **Governor Holcomb** , leading on critical issues from agriculture to supporting Hoosiers with disabilities.

And finally rounding out our statewide ticket, there’s attorney general nominee **Todd Rokita**. As Secretary of State, Todd helped protect our elections from fraud by instituting the nation’s first voter ID law, and as a member of Congress he was a strong conservative voice protecting the right to life and the 2nd Amendment. As our attorney general, he’ll work to fight for us and protect our rights.

We've got a team of proven leaders on your ballot this November. And it's these leaders who will help Indiana rebound again through this crisis.

\- Chairman Kyle Hupfer

**PHOTO: Todd Rokita** visits the Indiana GOP offices this week to sign the required paperwork to officially be listed on your general election ballot as our Republican attorney general nominee.
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| **_Investments & Endorsements_** Jobs announcements and endorsements! It's been a busy week for **Governor Holcomb**!

Yesterday, **Governor Holcomb** was on hand to [celebrate the opening of MonoSol's](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ef09e8215d&e=1acd9bb3d6) new high-tech, 150,000-sq.-ft. production facility in Boone County! This is the company’s fifth location in Indiana, where the company will create more new, high-wage positions for Hoosiers. Since 2017, Indiana has attacted more than 100,000 job commitments like this across the state!

This week, **Governor Holcomb** also [earned the endorsement of the Professional Firefighters Union of Indiana](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dd03f339bf&e=1acd9bb3d6). This is the organization's first gubernatorial endorsement since 2008. Our state's firefighters are always there for us, and Governor Holcomb is dedicated to serving them! _**“Our Hoosier firefighters are the original essential workers. No matter the situation – whether it’s floods, tornados, blizzards, earthquakes, or a global pandemic – our firefighters are always there for us. I am profusely grateful for them and their support, and I’ll work to continue to earn that support every single day.” - Gov. Holcomb**_ And then finally this week, **Governor Holcomb** announced that as Indiana's rate of COVID-19 test positivity continues to climb, Indiana will remain in Stage 4.5 through at least the end of the month. You can find full details on Stage 4.5 and the Back on Track plan [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a2b3b8a4b2&e=1acd9bb3d6). To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=aef9e5b9c8&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=113f981601&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cabd251c95&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8f37866514&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Thank You, Former Speaker Bosma!**_
Today, former Indiana Speaker of the House Brian Bosma announced that he’ll be officially retiring from the General Assembly at the end of the month. As Indiana’s longest-serving House speaker, his leadership has been instrumental in Indiana’s turnaround from a middle-of-the-pack state to a nationally-recognized leader in balanced budgets and responsible government.

Here’s what Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer had to say –

_**“Although we’ve known this day was coming, that doesn’t make it any less bittersweet. Brian Bosma’s positive impact on Indiana simply cannot be overstated. Even now, as we navigate our way through a global pandemic, Brian’s leadership and fiscal stewardship has Indiana in a strong position to weather this storm. Congratulations, Brian, on a well-earned retirement from the General Assembly. Our thanks to you and Cheryl for your decades of service to our state.** ”_
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Fiscal Responsibility Leads Indiana Through Crisis_** _Raise your hand if you can remember multiple times when Democrats said Indiana should spend the state’s budget surplus for any number of issues..._

Well, this week, Hoosiers can be thankful for responsible Republican leadership that built up Indiana’s savings for a rainy day. Due to the coronavirus pandemic, the state faced a $900 million budget shortfall at the close of the fiscal year. Thankfully, Indiana has been able to responsibly maintain essential services to Hoosiers during this difficult time – all without going into the red.

That’s largely due to some budget reversions, federal assistance...and the use of our surplus that was built by our fiscally responsible Republican leaders for a rainy day like this. While our surplus now stands at a lower total of $1.4 billion, we’re so thankful to live in a state that remains stable even through a crisis. That's Republican leadership at work.
---
| |
---

subject: Amanda Makki Outraises Charlie Crist in the Second Quarter
body:
| A Message From Amanda Makki For congress | |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=74158843f9&e=ee1c0329b3)
---
| | **For Immediate Release**
July 17, 2020
**Contact**
Sarah Bascom, sarah@bascomllc.com, 850.294.6636
**Amanda Makki Outraises Charlie Crist in the Second Quarter, Pulls Away As The CD13 Republican Frontrunner**
**St. Petersburg, FL –** Conservative Republican Amanda Makki’s 2020 Q2 campaign finance report continues to demonstrate why she is the strongest choice to be the Republican nominee for Florida’s 13th Congressional District. __Makki ended the quarter with twice as much cash on hand than the rest of the Republican candidates combined.__ Her fundraising and grassroots organization have proven she’s the conservative candidate to take on Liberal Charlie Crist in November.
---
|
---
| In addition, Makki has raised over $1 million in total contributions (including those slated for the general election against Crist) as Republican voters echo their support for her candidacy. _**A recent St.PetePolls.org showed Amanda Makki leading all other Primary Election candidates with likely CD13 Republican voters and a 42% favorability rating!**_ _“Thank you to everyone who has contributed their time and money to our campaign. We are nearly a month away from the Primary Election and I remain steadfast in our goal to defeat Charlie Crist”, said Makki. “Charlie Crist doesn’t stand for Pinellas County. He consistently votes with Nancy Pelosi to further the Left’s progressive agenda. As the conservative counterpunch, I am the only candidate who will put Pinellas County and American values first.”_ Makki’s recent endorsements come from Congressional Republican Leaders **Kevin McCarthy** , **Steve Scalise **as well as esteemed U.S. Armed Force members including **Senator Joni Ernst** , the first female combat veteran ever elected to the United States Senate. Other honored veterans’ supporters include **Congressmen Michael Waltz** (Lt. Colonel) and **Combat Veteran Robert O’Neill** of the elite Navy SEAL Team 6, who shot Osama bin Laden. **__Can we ask for your contribution today? We are only 30 days away from the primary and can remain the frontrunner and win on August 18 with your support!__**
---

Peter, Were you able to read the email below from my team? name: Team Christy
subject: This would save us $218,000

body:
| []()

| | Peter --

We're running out of time to raise the $17,000 we need by midnight tonight to cover Christy's candidate statement fees.

We _never_ take money from corporate PACs or D.C. lobbyists -- the folks Mike Garcia counts on to cover his campaign expenses -- because Christy is going to be a representative accountable to the people of our district, not special interests.

We know that our base of grassroots donors is strong enough to take on Garcia's special interest backers any day, and we're proud to be running a campaign that is truly people-powered. **But our strategy also means that we really need people like you to step up and chip in what you can, when you can, so we can run the strongest possible campaign.**

**[Peter, will you step up and pitch in $5 or more right now to help Christy hit her candidate statement goal?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baae/29776869/9e246c3/569eff78/3861148/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTdfbW00LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy_csgoal?refcode=em20_200717_mm4-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baae/29776869/9e246c3/569eff79/3861148/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTdfbW00LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy_csgoal?refcode=em20_200717_mm4-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baae/29776869/9e246c3/569eff7a/3861148/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTdfbW00LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy_csgoal?refcode=em20_200717_mm4-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

The candidate statement goes in the official county voter guides that are delivered to _every voter's home_ in the district.

If we were to try to mail every voter, it would cost $235,000 -- so $17,000 for the official voter guide is a really cost-effective way to get Christy's message out to the folks who need to see it.

**But right now, we are at risk of falling short of this goal.**

clean_body: | []() | | Peter -- We're running out of time to raise the $17,000 we need by midnight tonight to cover Christy's candidate statement fees. We never take money from corporate PACs or D.C. lobbyists -- the folks Mike Garcia counts on to cover his campaign expenses -- because Christy is going to be a representative accountable to the people of our district, not special interests. We know that our base of grassroots donors is strong enough to take on Garcia's special interest backers any day, and we're proud to be running a campaign that is truly people-powered. But our strategy also means that we really need people like you to step up and chip in what you can, when you can, so we can run the strongest possible campaign. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" "" | "" The candidate statement goes in the official county voter guides that are delivered to every voter's home in the district. If we were to try to mail every voter, it would cost $235,000 -- so $17,000 for the official voter guide is a really cost-effective way to get Christy's message out to the folks who need to see it. But right now, we are at risk of falling short of this goal. "" "" Thanks, Team Christy "" Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. "" | | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress. ---|--- |

name: Biden for President
subject: we're hoping to get your name on this important list:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We'd love to have yours on there when it's time for the convention! |
---
Peter,

There are just 31 days left until the beginning of the Democratic National Convention!

We're working on building a huge demonstration of support for Joe Biden and his future running mate, **and that starts by folks like you in Cresco adding your name to _officially_ endorse Joe Biden.**

It doesn't look like you've added your name yet to our official Team Joe endorsement list, and we'd love to have yours on there when it's time for the convention!

[**Peter, take a look below at some of our most recent endorsers, and then add your name next to theirs to endorse Joe yourself! »**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c773d/83831484/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Endorse-Joe-Biden?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.17_B3_endorsejoe_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.17_B3_endorsejoe_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-full") | [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c773d/83831484/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Endorse-Joe-Biden?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.17_B3_endorsejoe_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.17_B3_endorsejoe_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-full")
---
[ENDORSE JOE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c773c/83831484/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Endorse-Joe-Biden?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.17_B3_endorsejoe_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.17_B3_endorsejoe_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-full")
---
This is an important moment for unity, Peter. It's time for Americans of all stripes to band together and elect a president who can restore real leadership in the Oval Office.

And Peter, our party's convention next month will be an important moment to make it crystal-clear just how fired up we are to elect Joe Biden and unite the country.

**So we hope we can count on you to take the first step today by officially adding your name on our list of endorsers:**

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Endorse-Joe-Biden**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c773d/83831484/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Endorse-Joe-Biden?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.17_B3_endorsejoe_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.17_B3_endorsejoe_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-full")

Thanks for all you do!

Biden for President
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c773b/83831484/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c773a/83831484/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c7739/83831484/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c7738/83831484/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c7737/83831484/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c7736/83831484/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c7735/83831484/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c7734/83831484/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c7733/83831484/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c7732/83831484/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c7735/83831484/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c7731/83831484/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c7734/83831484/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b82a/1cd0ac28/8e5f33e0/357c7730/83831484/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: =?utf-8?Q?Genevieve=20Collins?=
subject: Another great week!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,
It was another busy and exciting week on our campaign for Congress. We have A LOT of lawn signs that just came in and we are working on getting deliveries out as soon as possible. If you would like a sign delivered to your yard, email us at info@gcforcongress.com to get on our delivery list.

Thursday, I had the opportunity to go on Fox & Friends to discuss the exciting development of more Republican women running for Congress, as well as my platform of less government in business, and more business in government.
---
| [ ](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=a97458427f&e=68aaeb0998)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=75c02e0eae&e=68aaeb0998)
---
---
| With millions of people now unemployed, North Texans deserve a representative who is a proven businesswoman with a record of creating jobs. [Watch the video](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=bfd6994951&e=68aaeb0998) I launched earlier this week about less government in business, and more business in government.

Thank you again to all of our supporters and donors. Because of YOU, we have over one million dollars on hand and this strong fundraising will allow us to continue sharing our message with voters across the 32nd Congressional District.

I hope you have a great weekend, and I look forward to keeping you up to date with everything that goes on in the coming week!

Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32

body:
Control of Congress is within our reach this year, and we can’t afford to let this moment slip through our hands. Friend, Greg reached out to you earlier this week and he wanted to be sure that you saw his message – did you see it?
**Nancy Pelosi just admitted that she doesn’t care about radical anarchists on the Left tearing down statues of American heroes – and it’s just one more reason to vote her out this November.** [**HELP GREG SEND NANCY PACKING ON NOVEMBER 3RD**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=7d2020944683469aa3fef5fa9d596280&_e=VaKqLvpBOy2IDD3VkpHokcr4keaxdDQT2T6nS6aZM8YVbIHuBiiE1QXKqrZF2e1Y-e0-3o6BzMlW5dIgssTZD0K1ADQ0mRzK2ieMYNiiqYS6gUMm85AE7gmZK2CqeT8xkTGEzIFLD0frO-e9LDKhxG6owWQHhCRymWrnUS5nsu1kU3CDuwy1MVActV8lAWiIWXe4N4y7MNdcZYoZ4P6NBDQs_Gtsb7qslH0I6alA8NhzcI17sR_BKjC88bLubcqtcHlfVectQNaOaOxDxKPI8t0MuXJIoHK6Jgbu15s2vAPcLqw7zfQ2feKnSbj2bBst-QZWGIsnJPOkq9Su94GtCCZddl2U4iKtY0QjzNUJb9Frhzt2vt61n7KhLRzKXXKjldcRHurokFfRHSr2cY3zvjm4arRlT6eaQD_zKzRuGXc%3D) Control of Congress is within our reach this year, and we can’t afford to let this moment slip through our hands.
That’s why Greg is working harder than ever to make sure that America’s past and future end up in the right hands in these upcoming elections. That starts with taking back the House and holding onto the Senate so they can work with President Trump again – not against him!
**[Chip in any amount to help Greg take back the House from Nancy Pelosi this November so that Congress can get back to building up America instead of tearing it down>>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=7d2020944683469aa3fef5fa9d596280&_e=VaKqLvpBOy2IDD3VkpHokcr4keaxdDQT2T6nS6aZM8YVbIHuBiiE1QXKqrZF2e1Y-e0-3o6BzMlW5dIgssTZD0K1ADQ0mRzK2ieMYNiiqYS6gUMm85AE7gmZK2CqeT8xkTGEzIFLD0frO-e9LDKhxG6owWQHhCRymWrnUS5nsu1kU3CDuwy1MVActV8lAWiIY6IS2RA3sb-OXgWWQUu3JUqVoKRcvqoakscKMqGQcHuluBmPa2ZLQkZYag7zApcZZuwz9Q4GaNkWSBh-qMCnN9m2Fjgm4OO8cG5ZlKB7F-RHspFEmGBkapcF76bPijgt7AIHwvTe26-H7Iow5d6K5W_Dv_OqQlpPhkA1kCo5WPoULeCgkNzfBygLrf2my1X12csNpKlhplo53YARD_DvbHwB6kS3xGZx05KbnO-go3o%3D)**
Thank you, Team Pence **\- - - Forwarded Message Below \- - -** From: Greg Pence Subject: Nancy Pelosi doesn't care To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=7d2020944683469aa3fef5fa9d596280&_e=VaKqLvpBOy2IDD3VkpHokcr4keaxdDQT2T6nS6aZM8YVbIHuBiiE1QXKqrZF2e1Y-e0-3o6BzMlW5dIgssTZD0K1ADQ0mRzK2ieMYNiiqYS6gUMm85AE7gmZK2CqeT8xkTGEzIFLD0frO-e9LDKhxG6owWQHhCRymWrnUS5nsu1kU3CDuwy1MVActV8lAWiIhwZivbq02LvSQUv1R0jJcozBnkAGgeRkEa_QyTJD9OQln4ZtNdcKNpP9vfRjct0AyFvF_yGVL8O2uyUkXGcetXeo7D8qZmEqoyZSubbWVQIwJUGwz5at4Y4kPCfjJcSVqKnHpbbYOIb53XRDxu3oqwwGISdVv1yWmhR3ZAcDZUjmrfo_zzAfbdfm2SFsC7XNy0VGzGeBtOUbsSN9nyYyaHujDetmiI5nh8lj5qD_ktU%3D)** [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=7d2020944683469aa3fef5fa9d596280&_e=VaKqLvpBOy2IDD3VkpHokcr4keaxdDQT2T6nS6aZM8YVbIHuBiiE1QXKqrZF2e1Y-e0-3o6BzMlW5dIgssTZD0K1ADQ0mRzK2ieMYNiiqYS6gUMm85AE7gmZK2CqeT8xkTGEzIFLD0frO-e9LDKhxG6owWQHhCRymWrnUS5nsu1kU3CDuwy1MVActV8lAWiIWXYmWm4B6R9AkytYtuwSJBZ7hAl1412NOQs-XkAslZTKdSTP4WeE5k9nQRa96z7PFzjs3oSGhGZiXTNsJKo6ZRbKja5dyZ0W41FrvqYhu3yMlSwBkqk7_IXJbD3EXm1aioddguQQOMbswK0JlCT3fStgF5ltEX7IXb0LJm9Iu5rqEaIykG6EgqyNmryVgNRp6ENduznvAbt48dB44V1_EzZxV8Y3tIUN1QztI_FSJ_c%3D) **“I don’t care that much about statues...people will do what they do.”** **\- Nancy Pelosi, July 9th, 2020** Friend, Once again, political correctness and the Left’s mob mentality are threatening to forever alter America’s history – and that’s fine with Nancy Pelosi. [**TAKE CONGRESS OUT OF NANCY’S HANDS THIS YEAR**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=7d2020944683469aa3fef5fa9d596280&_e=VaKqLvpBOy2IDD3VkpHokcr4keaxdDQT2T6nS6aZM8YVbIHuBiiE1QXKqrZF2e1Y-e0-3o6BzMlW5dIgssTZD0K1ADQ0mRzK2ieMYNiiqYS6gUMm85AE7gmZK2CqeT8xkTGEzIFLD0frO-e9LDKhxG6owWQHhCRymWrnUS5nsu1kU3CDuwy1MVActV8lAWiIsJr_djIklPQu29V2zz91eGC2LG-ZWLeAoHKLDFVFOC-bv2isOQ2G5du8EHZ-4v9sa6LTucKDJ2h5M2Yvn9t__6n-Rb48PtxBcyqARRLGbewaP4fd7Y7ZEbUl_uNq3flxklxzeDj1kaxP3ddUeW5iA0HOAwiy0nEETUzS70zms88m8-EiHzgwQKX928nvQ20bs0NDLJxISi_uEw15iDtyLB-sL_Yo6EMu7dd4kvRsciQ%3D) This is about something bigger than just statues of George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, and our other Founding Fathers.
The freedoms they gave us are under fire – and unless we take decisive action to defend them, those freedoms will be torn down after all their statues are.
**Nancy Pelosi either doesn’t understand that, or she doesn’t care. Either way, it’s time for us to take Congress back from her control this November, and that starts today.**
Friend, we’re just a matter of weeks away from Election Day, and the stakes are getting higher every day.
_**Will you help me save America’s history – and future – against the Left’s political correctness?**_ [**CHIP IN $10 TO TAKE BACK CONGRESS**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=7d2020944683469aa3fef5fa9d596280&_e=VaKqLvpBOy2IDD3VkpHokcr4keaxdDQT2T6nS6aZM8YVbIHuBiiE1QXKqrZF2e1YzFt8wn5BAX3lIsSHph8OL1cgVA_BZkYAV6ayhhLDzyTKV7eeUBcV9NKtAbJjyIt68zl0VQvjOehOFOrWOYoV8Wy8p7pUiHpH46d3rv4HVtXJFdQ-bOiFYx5Xc9Zlereu42zBa9M4LsiCl-iIn2Zu_2VCBxXcEdlDIDRdBVj0if0aSdtAf8eLykdwN1EdMq716Ulr-QsUWA_H9Qk_vXb--mcQuEG5NzZbX5hs2Rqj6U00_pBzVYz2bgj1HiWCDoy3NL40XScAo1K1n38owtrZJdylUG38Jidf12PHnfiigoX6WC4FYVP12F2Rs59tpQ22Y4fuBAwlyDK1jiDCEjQEBnHovKMjtYJD30mDv9dl6GM%3D) [**CHIP IN $25 TO TAKE BACK CONGRESS**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=7d2020944683469aa3fef5fa9d596280&_e=VaKqLvpBOy2IDD3VkpHokcr4keaxdDQT2T6nS6aZM8YVbIHuBiiE1QXKqrZF2e1YzFt8wn5BAX3lIsSHph8OL1trzfGkNzsDH4AD8fu74-HIv6cC1E_QY_zbrcx2e9J80EHeWbL6wVV_vlFOGmp7XxVtcGhm6Q4qLgQACfTj5uVDMlZBZCfopV6kVPJHMdMpvAI4PBdBH_NgMHYLCHOO7Js0L2qqpvh67JrqoIaDAhzD9i9sdkkj_GPMSY58z6v9m_zeeJ_G50ek04kaz5SfVWZWuSQ5emWZ88qDv2c-m7Au0bzrmll3HIIIvKPhwP8Vkcewg_Wu7NX-QubqBMMrzOO6g5yhk19hSzXNc24p5K-uHQG2PRffeHXGN-owBrW4jsvSH7deIXSMBghCZKtNGzfv5tGyLVhi2-gJD4dOygQ%3D) [**CHIP IN $50 TO TAKE BACK CONGRESS**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=7d2020944683469aa3fef5fa9d596280&_e=VaKqLvpBOy2IDD3VkpHokcr4keaxdDQT2T6nS6aZM8YVbIHuBiiE1QXKqrZF2e1YzFt8wn5BAX3lIsSHph8OL3nTi6x2VykB9DBasRPmAyNMevL4dgDf-1atqnqLaBkgpGKzJVZRf6HYJm1cueKp9Pkwu9pl9-O9Gbzok4cvovr5rFi0ccV1HYeMKnuL6LBGzeiRPkIW_8QtZ4I5FsoKcoz3MumL1OT8dOjzSTPMal21gAPyJOvpW2aqC0x7ZD0gJ0NAx5XCby6UsI6L0BxtL2HkW6YUttTKtqaPZq2qaUtbuPHg4D8QpqwBBd_O8-sggRdhTYDVA-Ptu_gBpBkCL6LVfXThxuce5ANwm805SNrCyFaVfnTHgursC1Im27A5Q2uRLcYzVW_PmtbDzJgApIv3K7xePLeuShTiLYWkFxE%3D) Thank you, Greg Pence |

This is about something bigger than just statues of George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, and our other Founding Fathers. The freedoms they gave us are under fire – and unless we take decisive action to defend them, those freedoms will be torn down after all their statues are. Nancy Pelosi either doesn’t understand that, or she doesn’t care. Either way, it’s time for us to take Congress back from her control this November, and that starts today. Friend, we’re just a matter of weeks away from Election Day, and the stakes are getting higher every day. Will you help me save America’s history – and future – against the Left’s political correctness? Thank you, Greg Pence | Federal election law requires political committees to use best efforts to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 during an election cycle. An individual may not contribute more than a total of $2,800 (maximum for Primary Election) per election to the committee. Federal law prohibits contributions to the committee from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organizations or national banks (including corporate or other business entity credit cards), from any person contributing another’s funds, from a Federal government contractor, or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status. | | | Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress | | PO Box 275 Taylorsville, IN 47280 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
For far too long, Chinese President Xi Jinping and his communist regime have been allowed to trample the basic human dignity of the Uighur population | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=276e33d731&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Trump Right to Act Against China for Its Inhumane Crimes Against Uighur Minority**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6b3ca8bcea&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“For far too long, Chinese President Xi Jinping and his communist regime have been allowed to trample the basic human dignity of the Uighur population in Xinjiang . . . With a committed Congress coupled with the leadership of President Trump, our country has begun to take the necessary steps to confront the Chinese regime,” Rep. Vicky Hartzler (R-MO) writes.

🎬**WATCH:**[**No leader has been tougher on China**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=68b27e911d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**NYPD-Bashing Ideologues Just Don’t Care About Reality**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b29ead7797&e=3ee4985eea)
_-New York Post_
“Every day makes it more obvious that facts just don’t matter to the cop-bashers and the politicians who cater to them. [New York City] Police Commissioner Dermot Shea gamely told the truth again Thursday, calling out state and city lawmakers for ‘going too far’ to ‘handcuff’ the NYPD,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| [**Ivanka Trump’s Big Idea: Overhaul Government Hiring to Prioritize Job Skills Over College Degrees**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=27b067a42d&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
Ivanka Trump, “a co-chair of the American Workforce Policy Advisory Board, has urged the government to engage in hiring practices to ‘better recognize the talents and competencies of all Americans’ it hires. Part of that is to prioritize job skills and talents over college degrees,” Brooke Singman writes.
---
|
---
| [**Trump’s New Regulations for Environmental Reviews Will Fix a Broken Process**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bca8443edc&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Denver Post_
“President Donald Trump has taken bold action to fix our broken environmental review process . . . This long overdue regulatory reform will benefit our environment and our economy by accelerating environmental reviews and modernizing the NEPA process for the 21st century,” writes Mary Neumayr, Chair of the Council on Environmental Quality.

**READ:**[**How President Trump Modernized Federal Environmental Reviews**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=48d47a4a99&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Media Are Just Plain Lying About Kayleigh McEnany 'Science' Quote**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=04dd3ff7fc&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“White House Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany on Wednesday tried to explain President Trump’s position that schools in the United States should re-open sooner rather than later . . . But you would never know what McEnany said or meant from following members of the press, many of whom selectively edited [her remarks],” Becket Adams writes.
---
|
