name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Working together for our small businesses
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Rhode Island's small businesses are the backbone of our economy. Over 99% of our businesses here in Rhode Island are small businesses, and more than half of Rhode Island's workforce works at a small business. Now, as they are facing an existential threat from COVID, we need to do everything in our power to support them. That's why my administration hit the ground running with immediate steps to support business owners with help applying for federal PPP loans, a bridge loan program to help businesses access federal lending, and technical support and supplies to ease the transition to remote work. But there's more to be done, which is why I launched Restore RI to provide even more support to small businesses with a direct investment of $100 million. To do that, I am working constantly with Senators Jack Reed and Sheldon Whitehouse and Representatives Jim Langevin and David Cicilline, all of whom have been essential in getting Rhode Island the funding we need to support our small businesses. Today, I held and event with Rhode Island's fantastic congressional delegation to discuss my how [my Restore RI plan](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e6sg3QN-LjSzibOAvHesv1bHQVR39MqfsZf2vCTAMQGuMYSgwMb_8uKwKx1wPmy_R-MTNl3wklYS1y8k96x8zQOfbQCU0H2pqozwdr3EPjmc6pwDOQwg0q95qGMFrl4rP95RjLo5nUhsnxWS_QChtgpCgzKoI-NJm2gmoHzKgbVJAV7uFVtFfr35syEfOtwZPAb5q3psUUjFEErNXddlBsAH4LPwLmlJNoAQ5uoXSHIyPrNn6XVbdPNeWrZueKnh5CvvuTCuVhnaQt-inB9BJ1iWqwiTEqSqAQD-ogiAsvGAeSs0TYIDGcO7mRrPNTytaUt8z7waYqeKvkuoe0RBNfwwGeJO8dsZR9EFxH-3isfvTKeWXMv9AUavoK8zKDyolNaSjaKiwvTcZ-IF6Er2gtDi29b1IBEPukPLe7akXEVQiP3YZLkYzRuX3_FSML5MVyFnb1qd6U47UTrI12QPGqxOoz_aQvLALvBXhuCLYWKQwgNN8y-yxEeZOYoeFcqI&c=sn6d8qJotOpChOj-fpQ2OGwXGyzrnjsKPTkOGx0U0rwFTHQU6vo8BA==&ch=Kp_VfHXlGHOs5UviltjQNHEBKkIxIM8fimUYeDxF1vr9J4TWqc_ISA==) will use millions in CARES Act funds to help Rhode Island businesses, and how they are going to keep fighting to secure more resources for Rhode Islanders.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e6sg3QN-LjSzibOAvHesv1bHQVR39MqfsZf2vCTAMQGuMYSgwMb_8uKwKx1wPmy_RwzEKJoMZvCRtBb9EvamSjY2I6cVIPhkKcwZcm0S_Zr_xawnsLPhIkPksvqsRaonmRiqCaDYQp7f8Ac_0KFgG9ZwnmJPgoJoM6hkCXkxLVheeyGhuPbT6lzJ0yDhwPYhpz1xIfIItq8=&c=sn6d8qJotOpChOj-fpQ2OGwXGyzrnjsKPTkOGx0U0rwFTHQU6vo8BA==&ch=Kp_VfHXlGHOs5UviltjQNHEBKkIxIM8fimUYeDxF1vr9J4TWqc_ISA==)
---
| Click here to watch my discussion with the [Rhode Island congressional delegation](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e6sg3QN-LjSzibOAvHesv1bHQVR39MqfsZf2vCTAMQGuMYSgwMb_8uKwKx1wPmy_RwzEKJoMZvCRtBb9EvamSjY2I6cVIPhkKcwZcm0S_Zr_xawnsLPhIkPksvqsRaonmRiqCaDYQp7f8Ac_0KFgG9ZwnmJPgoJoM6hkCXkxLVheeyGhuPbT6lzJ0yDhwPYhpz1xIfIItq8=&c=sn6d8qJotOpChOj-fpQ2OGwXGyzrnjsKPTkOGx0U0rwFTHQU6vo8BA==&ch=Kp_VfHXlGHOs5UviltjQNHEBKkIxIM8fimUYeDxF1vr9J4TWqc_ISA==).
---
| Through the Restore RI program, we're making a $100 million investment to directly support Rhode Island's small businesses. $50 million of this money will be made available in grants of up to $15,000 as part of the first round of funding to provide direct cash assistance. These funds will help businesses facing reopening expenses such as plexiglass, cleaning supplies, and touchless pay technology, as well as fixed costs like rent and utilities. That $100 million commitment is a floor, not a ceiling. We'll replenish the funds if more businesses need help. That money will go toward helping businesses get the supplies they need to reopen in a way that keeps both their employees and customers safe. Our businesses deserve more than just a cash infusion. That's why we're investing in programs that help the hardest-hit industries restructure their business models to stay viable throughout the pandemic and beyond. And we're setting aside money to specifically support our minority-owned businesses. Supporting our small businesses doesn't just mean helping them survive COVID-19 - it means setting them up to thrive afterwards. It is essential that this money reaches businesses in every part of the state as quickly as possible. Our team at Commerce is working around the clock to be able to make applications available in the next two weeks and to get you all the info you need to take part in Restore RI. If your businesses needs this support, you can prepare to apply by reviewing the details on [CommerceRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e6sg3QN-LjSzibOAvHesv1bHQVR39MqfsZf2vCTAMQGuMYSgwMb_8uKwKx1wPmy_R-MTNl3wklYS1y8k96x8zQOfbQCU0H2pqozwdr3EPjmc6pwDOQwg0q95qGMFrl4rP95RjLo5nUhsnxWS_QChtgpCgzKoI-NJm2gmoHzKgbVJAV7uFVtFfr35syEfOtwZPAb5q3psUUjFEErNXddlBsAH4LPwLmlJNoAQ5uoXSHIyPrNn6XVbdPNeWrZueKnh5CvvuTCuVhnaQt-inB9BJ1iWqwiTEqSqAQD-ogiAsvGAeSs0TYIDGcO7mRrPNTytaUt8z7waYqeKvkuoe0RBNfwwGeJO8dsZR9EFxH-3isfvTKeWXMv9AUavoK8zKDyolNaSjaKiwvTcZ-IF6Er2gtDi29b1IBEPukPLe7akXEVQiP3YZLkYzRuX3_FSML5MVyFnb1qd6U47UTrI12QPGqxOoz_aQvLALvBXhuCLYWKQwgNN8y-yxEeZOYoeFcqI&c=sn6d8qJotOpChOj-fpQ2OGwXGyzrnjsKPTkOGx0U0rwFTHQU6vo8BA==&ch=Kp_VfHXlGHOs5UviltjQNHEBKkIxIM8fimUYeDxF1vr9J4TWqc_ISA==) or by calling 521-HELP.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e6sg3QN-LjSzibOAvHesv1bHQVR39MqfsZf2vCTAMQGuMYSgwMb_8k7su0wT7yx29NB0PUQCtK66zDWFRbynhdbMx2MREnmFS500mHoUH_mmDJ6ziRT_2Hc_LALzROEgwImjBaEIIIFaHSl-Hf3QQ2QiIgwLTCnOys0E_YIcshsdwSO1Em0qpR3fNpt1y4pJlnILs53tvyU=&c=sn6d8qJotOpChOj-fpQ2OGwXGyzrnjsKPTkOGx0U0rwFTHQU6vo8BA==&ch=Kp_VfHXlGHOs5UviltjQNHEBKkIxIM8fimUYeDxF1vr9J4TWqc_ISA==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e6sg3QN-LjSzibOAvHesv1bHQVR39MqfsZf2vCTAMQGuMYSgwMb_8k7su0wT7yx29NB0PUQCtK66zDWFRbynhdbMx2MREnmFS500mHoUH_mmDJ6ziRT_2Hc_LALzROEgwImjBaEIIIFaHSl-Hf3QQ2QiIgwLTCnOys0E_YIcshsdwSO1Em0qpR3fNpt1y4pJlnILs53tvyU=&c=sn6d8qJotOpChOj-fpQ2OGwXGyzrnjsKPTkOGx0U0rwFTHQU6vo8BA==&ch=Kp_VfHXlGHOs5UviltjQNHEBKkIxIM8fimUYeDxF1vr9J4TWqc_ISA==).
---
| I cannot emphasize enough how impossible this would be without the incredible leadership of our congressional delegation. Senator Reed, Senator Whitehouse, Congressman Langevin, and Congressman Cicilline have shown us what leadership looks like throughout this pandemic with their laser-focus on helping Rhode Islanders. I am proud to be working with them as one unified front to get our state through this crisis.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e6sg3QN-LjSzibOAvHesv1bHQVR39MqfsZf2vCTAMQGuMYSgwMb_8uKwKx1wPmy_MaadBP5QGjo0utjAcqAX6ogD2CAjhs1gqg7lNlYO5gtlcLQ9ruaEWFLhzy6ennMpjGG5A58zIEsNuPY8OOpUN99V_J73Y13d7oaDRSfTn8RkZU9pJOZQcROw3lJXxub88dPVJ5fTptqCsfyDAApJHQT4w-sDE2P1RVV9FoSlMUhA9sotP1BgKjY0WTKXYTv1X9jZT9FEyIa8OJgsEKQo9BtmsiIvGqhz8baf_dIpk4wXowMFt7eIW0XcCTiuc5AkmCTfteF-pv5ZhBbJxNziCIEYp30gPxeBhRukJIVMYvPhpzR5BXIZNI2VeAsdDGdZt-e4_MD-YuPy8FrCeY_QF7krQ4QwyHjK1x5psaBbKjwjnr9OFFYZBAUbPr0ecuXo&c=sn6d8qJotOpChOj-fpQ2OGwXGyzrnjsKPTkOGx0U0rwFTHQU6vo8BA==&ch=Kp_VfHXlGHOs5UviltjQNHEBKkIxIM8fimUYeDxF1vr9J4TWqc_ISA==).

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: We've got to win Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
I remember sitting on the couch with Bruce on the night of November 8, 2016, with Ballers on the TV screen and election results on my laptop. The polls were closed, and there wasn't anything else I co | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e2/45c30650/1cc9689f0/66e84ab2/4250252087/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I never want to watch Republicans win Michigan again -- ever.

I remember sitting on the couch with Bruce on the night of November 8, 2016, with Ballers on the TV screen and election results on my laptop. The polls were closed, and there wasn't anything else I could do to affect the results. I just had to watch. And wait.

When Democrats lost Michigan, and all those other swing states slid into the GOP column, what haunted me was the knowledge that for so many Americans, life was about to get a whole lot tougher. And it has.

But since 2016, we've also seen people get into this fight like never before. In 2018, we took back the House. In 2020, we're coming for the Senate and the White House. Michigan is on the front lines of that fight -- and Democrats have learned that we need to fight our hearts out there.

**This November, we must re-elect my friend Senator Gary Peters in Michigan. He always puts working people first. But he's up against a well-funded GOP opponent, and Donald Trump would love nothing more than to get his hands on Michigan's electoral votes one more time.**

**[If you're in a place where you can donate now, will you chip in $2 or whatever makes sense to help re-elect my friend Gary Peters in Michigan, and support Warren Democrats running across the country?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e2/45c30650/1cc9689f0/66e84ab5/4250252087/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWdwIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxMkZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzE3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-gp?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT12F_EGR_END_E_20200717_V1S2_P")**

Let me tell you about my friend Gary Peters.

He's not the kind of guy who makes a beeline to the cameras on Capitol Hill and hogs credit for every good idea from sliced bread to Social Security.

But he's the kind of guy who puts his head down and gets things done for working families in Michigan and across the country.

So I'll do the bragging for him. He's poured his heart into the fight to protect the Great Lakes, defend protections for people with pre-existing conditions, lower prescription drug costs, and expand quality, affordable health care.

He's a fifth-generation Michigander who's served our country in the U.S. Navy Reserve, and he'll keep making us proud in the U.S. Senate. Bonus fun fact: He co-founded the Senate Motorcycle Caucus. Let's keep him at the wheel and in this fight to make our country work for working people.

But he's up against a real challenge this year. Donald Trump's allies and Betsy DeVos' family are dumping millions of dollars into Michigan -- so we need to fight by his side.

**Control of the Senate is on the line, and by investing in Gary Peters, you'll help lift up the entire Democratic ticket in Michigan -- from Joe Biden to the state house to local leaders.**

This November, when the polls are closed and the votes are all in the mail, I don't want to feel like there's anything else I could have done to make sure we win big.

**[Let's leave it all on the field. If you can, please split a contribution right now between Gary Peters' re-election campaign and ours.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e2/45c30650/1cc9689f0/66e84ab5/4250252087/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWdwIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxMkZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzE3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-gp?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT12F_EGR_END_E_20200717_V1S2_P")**

Elizabeth

clean_body: I remember sitting on the couch with Bruce on the night of November 8, 2016, with Ballers on the TV screen and election results on my laptop. The polls were closed, and there wasn't anything else I co | | | "" I never want to watch Republicans win Michigan again -- ever. I remember sitting on the couch with Bruce on the night of November 8, 2016, with Ballers on the TV screen and election results on my laptop. The polls were closed, and there wasn't anything else I could do to affect the results. I just had to watch. And wait. When Democrats lost Michigan, and all those other swing states slid into the GOP column, what haunted me was the knowledge that for so many Americans, life was about to get a whole lot tougher. And it has. But since 2016, we've also seen people get into this fight like never before. In 2018, we took back the House. In 2020, we're coming for the Senate and the White House. Michigan is on the front lines of that fight -- and Democrats have learned that we need to fight our hearts out there. This November, we must re-elect my friend Senator Gary Peters in Michigan. He always puts working people first. But he's up against a well-funded GOP opponent, and Donald Trump would love nothing more than to get his hands on Michigan's electoral votes one more time. "" Let me tell you about my friend Gary Peters. He's not the kind of guy who makes a beeline to the cameras on Capitol Hill and hogs credit for every good idea from sliced bread to Social Security. But he's the kind of guy who puts his head down and gets things done for working families in Michigan and across the country. So I'll do the bragging for him. He's poured his heart into the fight to protect the Great Lakes, defend protections for people with pre-existing conditions, lower prescription drug costs, and expand quality, affordable health care. He's a fifth-generation Michigander who's served our country in the U.S. Navy Reserve, and he'll keep making us proud in the U.S. Senate. Bonus fun fact: He co-founded the Senate Motorcycle Caucus. Let's keep him at the wheel and in this fight to make our country work for working people. But he's up against a real challenge this year. Donald Trump's allies and Betsy DeVos' family are dumping millions of dollars into Michigan -- so we need to fight by his side. Control of the Senate is on the line, and by investing in Gary Peters, you'll help lift up the entire Democratic ticket in Michigan -- from Joe Biden to the state house to local leaders. This November, when the polls are closed and the votes are all in the mail, I don't want to feel like there's anything else I could have done to make sure we win big. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

subject: The history of political communications, plus #StrikeForBlackLives
body:
Relational organizing is the future of political communications, but we take lessons from the past. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/outvote.io/july-17-2020?e=0aad15100c)
---
| _Organizing for everyone._
---
| | | |
---
|
---
|
**This Week in Democracy:**

---
| [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=69541cde78&e=0aad15100c)
---

In June, we wrote about how [the future of organizing is relational](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=f8a7e400f9&e=0aad15100c). This week we're taking a look back at the methods of political communication that got us here, recognizing that relational organizing is simply the latest step in building trust between campaigns and voters. [Read the piece here](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=ff794d267f&e=0aad15100c)!

| [Read On](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=88afee8d16&e=0aad15100c "Read On")

_7.9.20 | POLITICO_ SEIU's significant grassroots organizing power will be thrown behind Biden.

|

|

---
There is no economic justice without racial justice. [RSVP to #StrikeForBlackLives](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=2d7639d558&e=0aad15100c) on July 20 and rise up in support of dismantling racism and white supremacy.

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Rev. Raphael Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Winning in Georgia is key to Democrats righting the ship and retaking the Senate majority.

| | |
---
Friend,

This is a difficult time in our nation's history.

The threats we're facing - from foreign election interference to stagnating wages to global health crises - put the future of our democracy at risk.
That's why this year's elections are the most consequential of our lifetimes - and why it's never been more important to elect Democratic leaders who will fight for the most vulnerable among us. **That's why I endorsed Reverend Raphael Warnock for U.S. Senate in Georgia - [and why I'm asking you to support his campaign today.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5a9/288179be/9b0906b/348e77cc/2631383701/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzgxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Reverend Warnock is the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. If elected, he'd be the first Black senator our state has _ever_ elected. Reverend Warnock is running to restore moral leadership to Washington and to stand up for Georgia families who have been left behind by Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump.
With Republicans turning their backs on the hardworking people of Georgia, it's never been more important _ _ to elect leaders like Reverend Warnock who will lead _by and for the people_ - someone who will be a champion for voting rights, workers' rights, affordable health care and more.

Reverend Warnock gives me hope that we can create a better and brighter future for all, not just the lucky few.
But here's what's at stake: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats _can_ take back the Senate - but we _have_ to win in Georgia. Winning this battleground state is key to Democrats righting the ship and retaking the Senate majority.
**Right now, Reverend Warnock is up against a critical mid-month deadline - but with time running out, he's still falling short and can't make up the difference without your support. So I have to ask: ****[Please, friend, will you give $5 or more now- before midnight tonight - to help Reverend Warnock flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5a9/288179be/9b0906b/348e77cc/2631383701/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzgxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for fighting with us.

Stacey Abrams

Friend,

Did you see the breaking news out of Chicago today?

**Federal prosecutors implicated both Illinois House Speaker Mike Madigan and Governor Pritzker in sweeping investigations related to bribery, fraud, and corruption charges.**

Sadly, this is just the latest chapter in the long story of Illinois’ corrupt politics and yet another embarrassment to our state’s political image.

_However, this is also an opportunity for us to take a hard look at how we got here, and how we can turn this moment into positive change for the future of Illinois._

**Illinoisans deserve better than the constant abuses of power we read about in the news coming from our state’s Democratic Party – and we have the chance to change that on November 3rd.**

**_Will you stand with me today against the corruption we’re seeing by chipping in any amount to usher in a new generation of leadership for Illinois this November?_**
[**HELP ME RESTORE PRINCIPLED,**
**CONSERVATIVE LEADERSHIP TO ILLINOIS**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=c235dcd2f7d04d3a925028d11a532a36&_e=wbdYEntYbo0eqspSE4BJqqg6uYd6bV4iakm48zSXkdndpWHlAJojSFkJD_ecXwR3ix6xangdJMHgtSm497YMOv7yMcgLqEm76l096DryUn0efjbGC-IB42sqwRQuCBeWpj3I0YipTqyy4tF25RPkTB5NsTFtf1Zt094suBPbHPKAJusc_9y_L_AmCOmGcl6XBqrT6P7OyU21YpL1ukQehFb5B9W9TMqMAvEqPxS_ywoAVMB3Lmq_dbMUK5LZpg_GliTvUJeFKLur7z2SLHlYu0UAwRxhHAqj0ULeFWKHM1Nz2UrHHx9n2PWrVOdIPReKEyElefbSar6lO-8_LbNsxFlMXX5z80I4Ar5HZx-0mAdNkAwtkRi4IQosVekD4-Zyh4wP4fiQaYPrZrrVb8AdfpkafpxiFH08g7E1R0w2ADR4A7udyBtev8oEKAnx8p18pEk3FvDsUVm_-H56txh7en6w_lH-w0ah0vRmfiaPajY%3D)
As a former federal prosecutor, these federal investigations are a step in the right direction – but we still need to do our part to root out the corrupt career politicians ruining our state.

**That starts with mobilizing voters at the ballot box to vote for principled, conservative leaders who can turn Illinois around and restore transparency to our state’s political system.**

Friend, will you join me today by chipping in any amount to support a new generation of leadership for Illinois while putting an end to the corrupt political circus that Democrats have been running for years?
[**HELP ME RESTORE PRINCIPLED,**
**CONSERVATIVE LEADERSHIP TO ILLINOIS**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=c235dcd2f7d04d3a925028d11a532a36&_e=wbdYEntYbo0eqspSE4BJqqg6uYd6bV4iakm48zSXkdndpWHlAJojSFkJD_ecXwR3ix6xangdJMHgtSm497YMOv7yMcgLqEm76l096DryUn0efjbGC-IB42sqwRQuCBeWpj3I0YipTqyy4tF25RPkTB5NsTFtf1Zt094suBPbHPKAJusc_9y_L_AmCOmGcl6XBqrT6P7OyU21YpL1ukQehFb5B9W9TMqMAvEqPxS_ywoAVMB3Lmq_dbMUK5LZpg_GliTvUJeFKLur7z2SLHlYu8s05hkJUFKYL3LZO6m37xavcsGGEQoxdgXyToniRt5ZKFdkvHBqdRkWCOE05QaNT98OpvoQzMN-IvtyNd7xA6vlHs2s4Q4tGZNgRIHlLhqmoRXZn-SFHuI1YglhZSfZjFSsNitdi9p4vPn38J23TLflBWfTDhQedlYkvADfoZiNvqNek5bPCIHxbTjmEjpSpEgXmwBppvW22_bZHFzUcRo%3D)
Thank you,
Darin LaHood

clean_body: Check out the latest headlines to stay up to date! Friend, Happy Friday! We’re capping off another week on the campaign trail today – but I wanted to catch you before you head into the weekend to bring you up to speed on everything that’s happened this week. Find your top headlines below: ⬇️ CAN'T-MISS HEADLINE FROM THIS WEEK ⬇️ We’re Paying the Price For Brindisi’s Empty Promises – Again! Anthony Brindisi made a pledge to New Yorkers that he would go to Washington and put a lid on Spectrum’s out-of-control rate hikes and poor service – and what has he done to back up that promise? Not a single thing. We can’t afford to keep paying the price for his failure to lead, but what else would we expect from a career politician? View and share the post | | Standing with Our Police Officers Holding the Thin Blue Line in NY-22 Were you with us in Camden earlier this week? Supporters from all over the district came out to #BackTheBlue and show our local police officers that even though Anthony Brindisi isn’t with them, we’ll always have their backs! View and share the post | Do You Own A Semi-Automatic Rifle? You Won’t Under A Biden Presidency The Constitution clearly states that our right to keep and bear arms “shall not be infringed” – but Joe Biden plans to infringe the second he gets into the Oval Office if he wins in November. It’s on us to stop him so our rights and our Constitution stay safe for four more years. View and share the post | Even the Dems in Albany Know – Cuomo’s Gotta be Held Accountable! State legislators in Albany will be addressing the 6,400 nursing home deaths that happened as a result of Gov. Cuomo’s order by holding hearings on August 3rd and 10th. Our frontline workers and elderly New Yorkers deserve justice – and this is a step in the right direction! View and share the post | Dear Remington Arms Workers – I have your back! Families in our own communities are hurting today as furloughs begin at the Remington Arms plant in Ilion. This is the result of years of attacks on our nation’s oldest arms manufacturer coming from liberals in Albany and in Washington – and it’s time that our friends at Remington and UMWA had a representative that stood with them – not against them! View and share the post | Governor Cuomo Continues to Hurt New York’s Bars and Restaurants New York’s small businesses are being targeted by another wave of Cuomo’s regulations at a time when they’re still just getting back on their feet. This is the last thing our communities need from Albany right now, and it’s time for Cuomo to focus on the real issues at hand – like protecting our vulnerable seniors in nursing homes! I am a U.S. citizen or a lawfully admitted permanent resident, and I am not a foreign national or a federal contractor. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: some bad news to share
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello --
This isn't the news I wanted to share, but our opponent just reported a "massive advantage" in cash-on-hand -- more than twice as much as our team reported this month!
**So I 'm emailing you right now with an urgent last minute request to help us close this financial gap.**
Unlike my opponent, I am refusing to take any money from corporate PACs -- and I don't have anything like Mitch McConnell's right-wing attack machine supporting me.
So the only chance we have to make up this difference and flip this Senate seat blue is if a whole lot of folks like you step up today. Remember: Democrats cannot end Mitch McConnell's majority without winning here in Colorado.
[**Will you contribute $3 or more to our grassroots campaign before tonight's deadline? Any amount you give will ensure we have the resources to fight back and win this election:**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc58c/2a380d31/2372cc1d/f0ad10/2559722550/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA3MTdfbXdoNGpoX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200717_mwh4jh_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Defeat Sen. Cornyn (via MJ Hegar)
subject: Sen. Cornyn's reaction to our fundraising numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Hint: he's terrified of how powerful our grassroots team is.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee1/7f51f7bc/418e79b3/4ef65779/1937828004/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Sen. Cornyn is TERRIFIED of this team, Peter! He just sent out an email about **how strong we are** after we raised over $100,000 online during MJ's first 24 hours as the nominee. **[Check out his email below, then pitch in to make him even more scared.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee1/7f51f7bc/418e79b3/4ef65778/1937828004/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200717.3nd__1777__&amount=10")**

This team has accomplished some truly incredible things, but we need to do even more -- which is why we're looking to raise ANOTHER $100,000 online today. This race won't be easy to win and we can't let up. **[Help us out and show Sen. Cornyn that he can't stop our momentum!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee1/7f51f7bc/418e79b3/4ef65778/1937828004/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200717.3nd__1777__&amount=10")** \-- Team MJ | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee1/7f51f7bc/418e79b3/4ef65778/1937828004/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200717.3nd__1777__&amount=10")
---

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee1/7f51f7bc/418e79b3/4ef65778/1937828004/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200717.3nd__1777__&amount=10")**

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee1/7f51f7bc/418e79b3/4ef6577f/1937828004/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1777&amount=10")**

name: James Mackler
subject: Before they hang up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
We need your help:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c3/18d6a294/4c828f15/26d7f662/1071752837/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Folks - Tonight is a [**huge**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c3/18d6a294/4c828f15/26d7f663/1071752837/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTdwbTIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200717pm2?refcode=jme200717pm2_m_other&refcode2=107423") night for our campaign. Our pre-primary filing deadline is at midnight and our opponent Bill Hagerty needed to call in President Trump to help make a last minute pitch for his campaign. Hagerty went even further than that, calling his biggest ally our [_**" GREATEST PRESIDENT." **_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c3/18d6a294/4c828f15/26d7f663/1071752837/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTdwbTIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200717pm2?refcode=jme200717pm2_m_other&refcode2=107423") From failing to act on Russian Bounties, to making Tennessee the leader in rural hospital closures per person, and botching a response to the pandemic that has cost us more than 130,000 lives, Trump's record is nothing to celebrate. It's clear from Hagerty's praise that he'll say and do whatever it takes to get elected to the Senate. Once he's there, he'll be a rubber stamp for all the special interests and corporate PACs that installed him there, and that's not going to help Tennessee. That's not me. I'm a combat veteran running for Senate to serve all Tennesseans in a time of crisis. That's who I am, and it's why I stepped forward. [_**I can 't do this without you -- if you are able, make a contribution before hang up the phone 7:30 p.m. tonight to help reach our critical $10,000 goal.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c3/18d6a294/4c828f15/26d7f663/1071752837/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTdwbTIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200717pm2?refcode=jme200717pm2_m_other&refcode2=107423") In service, James
---

|
---
| | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate
---
